name: Team Christy
subject: Hit our goal and send Trump a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Right now, Americans are grappling with a virus of global proportions that has officially claimed more lives than the war in Vietnam.

Our government needs to be doing everything it can to provide relief, protection, and leadership to our communities and the world.

But instead of tackling this crisis with the full force of the executive branch at his disposal, Donald Trump is attacking Christy on Twitter and fundraising for our opponent. We've said this race is a referendum on Trump's handling of the pandemic, and **it's never been more true.**

**[If you want to send Trump a message and tell him to do his job instead of wading into our race, help crush our $1 million goal and defend this battleground district.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7334/3679458047/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7335/3679458047/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7336/3679458047/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7337/3679458047/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7330/3679458047/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7331/3679458047/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7334/3679458047/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full")
Trump should be worrying about testing for our communities. He should be doing everything he can to make sure our hospitals and first responders have the protective equipment they need to do their jobs. He should be making sure Americans are safe and prepared before reopening the economy.

But he's not. He's busy tweeting about flipping this seat red in the hopes of taking the spotlight off of himself and improving his own prospects for re-election.

**[This campaign ends in 9 days, we've set a goal of $1 million so we can show Trump and the nation that Americans aren't happy with his work. If you're ready to send Trump a message, help us crush our goal.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7334/3679458047/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7334/3679458047/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full")
Thank you,

Team Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb1d/29776869/a7de35d/569f7334/3679458047/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDNfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw2LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200503_milliongoal6-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Welcome to Tea Party Patriots Action - Part 2: Make a Difference
body:
**1** **WE’RE GRASSROOTS** **2** **MAKE A DIFFERENCE** **3** **STAY INFORMED** **4** **JOIN WITH OTHERS** | |
---
One of the main goals of The Tea Party movement has always been holding politicians in both parties accountable. Over the years, the work of Tea Party Patriots has proven that elected officials still care about what their constituents think. When an issue arises, we call on our network of supporters to take action and make a difference. This can be done through various avenues, including our groups, mailers, automated calls, and most commonly, our website and email system.

There have been many successful ways that the each individual has been able to get involved. Here are some ways that we will call on you to be proactive with our nation’s politicians:
|
---
Contact Your Members of Congress
There are times when we ask for a grassroots effort to contact specific members, or even all of Congress. When this happens, we will let you know how to best communicate the issue with these legislators. It can be by providing a specific list of representatives that are at the heart of the situation or having you contact your congressman and/or senators. When we do this, you will be provided with a list of these legislators.
**sen. Charles Schumer (D)**
322 Hart Senate Office Building
Washington DC 20510

To facilitate this communication, we provide a few different ways to get in touch with your legislator: **Mail** , **Phone** , **Facebook** , and **Twitter** (we will even insert a recommended line of text in the generated tweet).

Note: In today’s world of technology, many people find email as an efficient tool to communicate with those whom they may not otherwise contact. Certainly, any action is better than none at all. _However, email (which can easily be filtered) has far less impact than a phone call, traditional letter or even a public “tweet” via Twitter._ These have been proven methods that grab the attention of those in leadership.
|
---
Sign a Petition
Throughout history, petitions have helped to bring about significant changes in government. Notably, nearly 200 years ago, [petitions demanding an end to slavery gathered](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI1LTdhMWY1MDBlZjdmNzQ3M2M4ZDc1M2NkMDY3Zjc4NDdh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy50ZWFjaHVzaGlzdG9yeS5vcmcvc2Vjb25kLWdyZWF0LWF3YWtlbmluZy1hZ2UtcmVmb3JtL3Jlc291cmNlcy9hbnRpLXNsYXZlcnktcGV0aXRpb24_bWlkPTQxOTQ2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=bvLtSYZ2MtgDUNjvoN55eg) over a hundred thousand signatures and became a catalyst that motivated Congress to take up the issue and eventually outlaw it altogether. In fact, the act of organizing and networking those petition drives [helped prepare the women’s suffrage movement](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI1LTdhMWY1MDBlZjdmNzQ3M2M4ZDc1M2NkMDY3Zjc4NDdh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL25ld3MvbW9ua2V5LWNhZ2Uvd3AvMjAxNC8wOS8yMi9ob3ctb3JkaW5hcnktcGV0aXRpb25zLWhlbHBlZC1lbmQtc2xhdmVyeS1hbmQtbWFrZS13b21lbi1pbnRvLXBvbGl0aWNhbC1hY3RpdmlzdHMvP21pZD00MTk0NiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=DkScq2FudydjyuQAaxnISw) for their own political battle years later.
These days, technology allows us to provide you with opportunity to sign a petition in a quick, simple way, with no need to answer the door, pay for postage, or make a trip to the local courthouse. Here is an example of what a petition may look like in your email:

---
While we all continue to deal with the fallout from coronavirus and the responses by our local and state governments, and even though the House isn’t meeting right now, we must stay vigilant and watch their every move. The left wants so badly to use the virus as the reason to bail out profligate, blue states. We cannot let them!
**Ongoing Action**
Pray for our nation!
|
---
**Action Item #1**
**Call or use the online contact form for your federal Representative and Senators to tell them NO state bailouts!** Democrat Governors and their allies in Congress want to use federal tax dollars to bail out blue states that have spent decades overspending and overtaxing their residents. Now they see that there’s a possibility they could get money to bail out their bankrupt pension funds (as one example) with tax dollars from citizens who live in states that have responsibly managed their budgets. Their goal is to use coronavirus as the excuse, blaming their budget shortfalls on the virus, rather than on their decades of bad behavior. So, we must speak up now against this!
**sen. Charles Schumer (D)**
322 Hart Senate Office Building
Washington DC 20510

_We estimated that you live in the state of NY, but we were unable able to determine your Congressional District. Please[Update Your Profile](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI1LTJhMmRiNDJlMTgzYTQxNDViNGI2OWNiZDgwMzJmN2Zl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZGFzaGJvYXJkL2VkaXQtcHJvZmlsZS8_bWlkPTQxOTQ4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xSo1XNm88gfhfOy0pQRUgw "Update Profile Settings") or go to [Find your Members of Congress](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTI1LTJhMmRiNDJlMTgzYTQxNDViNGI2OWNiZDgwMzJmN2Zl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjk%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY29udGFjdC1jb25ncmVzcz9taWQ9NDE5NDgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=8I8QdQ3JvBx1yN-LAERPrw) to locate it._
**Sample Script/Content for Contact Form**
_Hi, my name is**[Your Name]** , and I live in **[City, State]**. I’m contacting you to urge you to vote NO on any state bailouts. It is fundamentally unfair to make the taxpayers in a state that has been fiscally responsible bail out the states that have been fiscally irresponsible for decades. And, it is shameless to use coronavirus as the excuse. It would be a travesty of justice and a violation of our system of federalism to force one state to pay for the bad behavior of another. I strongly urge you to stand against any form of a state bailout. Thank you._
|
---
**Action Item #2**
**Email or call your Governor’s office with the following information, depending on the situation in your state.**
* _If your state has released plans to reopen soon:_ Thank them and encourage them to continue with the reopening plans.
* _If your state is not reopening/the lockdown is being extended:_ Urge them to start reopening your state and communities, and to stop the lockdowns.

|
---
**Action Item #3**
**If you or someone in your family (like your spouse, for example) has been laid off personally, please send us a video about what happened to you.** Talk about how you were doing before all of this, how you’re doing now, and whether or not you are optimistic about your future. There are many people in the media, on the left, and even some conservatives who keep repeating the idea that joblessness is not really a big deal. Or, that the economic devastation is not a big deal.

In order to get you back to work so you can care for your family, we need to show the truth. We need to show that every job loss is a personal tragedy for that person and that family. They’re not vague, impersonal numbers. You are a real person and there were real consequences when you lost your job because of government orders. Additionally, we all care about protecting vulnerable, high-risk Americans, but we should also care about protecting families from enforced destitution. We can care about both at the same time! **Send your videos to[photos@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:photos@teapartypatriots.org?subject=Economic Devastation Story "photos@teapartypatriots.org").**
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, MAY 4TH @ 1 P.M. ET » OR | | While we all continue to deal with the fallout from coronavirus and the responses by our local and state governments, and even though the House isn’t meeting right now, we must stay vigilant and watch their every move. The left wants so badly to use the virus as the reason to bail out profligate, blue states. We cannot let them! Ongoing Action Pray for our nation! | Action Item #1 Call or use the online contact form for your federal Representative and Senators to tell them NO state bailouts! Democrat Governors and their allies in Congress want to use federal tax dollars to bail out blue states that have spent decades overspending and overtaxing their residents. Now they see that there’s a possibility they could get money to bail out their bankrupt pension funds (as one example) with tax dollars from citizens who live in states that have responsibly managed their budgets. Their goal is to use coronavirus as the excuse, blaming their budget shortfalls on the virus, rather than on their decades of bad behavior. So, we must speak up now against this! sen. Charles Schumer (D) 322 Hart Senate Office Building Washington DC 20510 | sen. Kirsten Gillibrand (D) 478 Russell Senate Office Building Washington DC 20510 | We estimated that you live in the state of NY, but we were unable able to determine your Congressional District. Please "Update Profile Settings" or go to to locate it. Sample Script/Content for Contact Form Hi, my name is[Your Name] , and I live in [City, State]. I’m contacting you to urge you to vote NO on any state bailouts. It is fundamentally unfair to make the taxpayers in a state that has been fiscally responsible bail out the states that have been fiscally irresponsible for decades. And, it is shameless to use coronavirus as the excuse. It would be a travesty of justice and a violation of our system of federalism to force one state to pay for the bad behavior of another. I strongly urge you to stand against any form of a state bailout. Thank you. | Action Item #2 Email or call your Governor’s office with the following information, depending on the situation in your state. If your state has released plans to reopen soon: Thank them and encourage them to continue with the reopening plans. If your state is not reopening/the lockdown is being extended: Urge them to start reopening your state and communities, and to stop the lockdowns. | Action Item #3 If you or someone in your family (like your spouse, for example) has been laid off personally, please send us a video about what happened to you. Talk about how you were doing before all of this, how you’re doing now, and whether or not you are optimistic about your future. There are many people in the media, on the left, and even some conservatives who keep repeating the idea that joblessness is not really a big deal. Or, that the economic devastation is not a big deal. In order to get you back to work so you can care for your family, we need to show the truth. We need to show that every job loss is a personal tragedy for that person and that family. They’re not vague, impersonal numbers. You are a real person and there were real consequences when you lost your job because of government orders. Additionally, we all care about protecting vulnerable, high-risk Americans, but we should also care about protecting families from enforced destitution. We can care about both at the same time! Send your videos tomailto:photos@teapartypatriots.org?subject=Economic Devastation Story "photos@teapartypatriots.org". name: NH Beer Caucus
subject: You're invited to the Second Beer Caucus Happy Hour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Hi Derek,
**Greetings!**

You are invited to the **Second** Beer Caucus Happy Hour with Senate and House GOP Leaders Sen Chuck Morse and Rep Dick Hinch
We will be talking over beers and other **libations** about what is happening right now at the State House (will it open, won't it open, what happens if... ), what it is like herding cats (GOP Members) vs Sheep (Dems), as well as politics and current events. This conversation will be interactive as you can message in questions using the Chat Feature and we will endeavor to bring them up during the conversation. Bring your libation, or glass of water, and enjoy the fun. **And yes, expect some fun and laughter.**
You are invited to a Zoom meeting.
When: May 13, 2020 07:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)
Register in advance for this meeting:
[https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZUvdOmpqz8vH9AH_OlybfdMal3YuqjOKSHx](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDEzNzEwMTY4NDk0OTcwNjQyJmM9cTBhNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDQzNTA0MTYmZD1pOWMwZjBl.-sUrC16UUrMe9MUApF5lRvBozPKL2q9h3Qx-m9327HM)
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting, Please do not share this.

Feel free to send this message to your friends and family to join, and allow them to register if they wish to join.

Sincerely,

Rep. Timothy P. Lang Sr. (R - Sanbornton), Rep Howard Pearl (R - Loudon) , Rep Reed Panasiti (R - Amherst), Hon Mike Moffett (R - Loudon)
Contact info: [603-566-9802](tel:603-566-9802) or [timothy.lang@leg.state.nh.us](mailto:timothy.lang@leg.state.nh.us)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Why should someone from outside Texas care about a race in Texas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This race is key to flipping the Senate, and the outcome will affect the entire country.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c8/7f51f7bc/4fe64be2/4ef168ac/3294718015/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- Wondering why someone from outside Texas should care about a Senate race in Texas? Give me a minute to explain, and then **[donate just $1 to help us defeat Mitch McConnell's right-hand man and flip the Senate in November!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c8/7f51f7bc/4fe64be2/4ef168a3/3294718015/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-texas-nd?refcode=email_20200504.1nd__1345__&amount=1")** (I know this isn't an easy time, so please only give if you can).

The truth is that the outcome of Texas' Senate race will impact Americans all over the country, not just those in the Lone Star State. Sen. Cornyn's votes have consistently put his special interest and corporate PAC donors ahead of hard-working families across the nation.

He voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and even during a public health crisis, he's refusing to oppose a lawsuit that could strike down the entire law -- including essential protections for people with pre-existing conditions. He's also put the NRA ahead of the safety of our communities, refusing to support even the most basic gun safety measures.

**The good news is we can defeat him this November._The Hill_ wrote that Sen. Cornyn is facing his "toughest race yet," and _The Washington Post_ named Texas' Senate seat as one of the top 10 most likely to flip. Plus, the nonpartisan Cook Political Report just upgraded MJ's likelihood of defeating Sen. Cornyn!** **[DONATE $1 NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900c8/7f51f7bc/4fe64be2/4ef168a3/3294718015/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-texas-nd?refcode=email_20200504.1nd__1345__&amount=1")** As a combat veteran and working mom who understands the challenges working families face every single day, I know I can win this race -- but I need your help to make it happen.

**Unlike Sen. Cornyn, I 'm not taking any money from corporate PACs. I'm counting on our team of over 42,000 donors who pitch in an average online donation of just $23 at a time to keep us going. If you're able, will you join our team by making a donation of just $1 to help us win in Texas and flip the Senate?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

[ ]( # ) REPORT CONSTITUTIONAL VIOLATIONS to Rep. Dana Criswell!
[ ]( # )

During the COVID-19 pandemic the people of Mississippi have willingly closed businesses, attend church online, and put their lives on hold to fight the virus.

But, we are not willing to abandon our constitution and give up the hard-fought rights that make our country and our state the free society we all love.

Unfortunately, government officials have seized upon this pandemic as a way to increase their power and limit the rights and freedoms of the citizens of Mississippi. We first saw this when the mayor of Greenville, MS tried to stop people from worshiping by ticketing and threatening jail for holding parking-lot church. Then in Holly Springs police were called to arrest worshipers who were practicing social distancing.

Shopping at Walmart is acceptable but worshiping God is not, according to local police.
Next, it was the mayor of Jackson, MS banning open carry within the city limits. All of these violations of our constitutional rights were stopped because people spoke up and demanded their rights. I led the fight against the Greenville mayor by being one of the first elected officials willing to speak out publicly condemning the mayor's order.(Read my letter)

I also joined with the Mississippi Justice Institute and led the charge against the Jackson mayor by filing a lawsuit against the mayor's unconstitutional executive order. Mississippi Attorney General Lynn Fitch and US Attorney Mike Hurst both joined me in the lawsuit which lead to a swift withdrawal of the order.

The fight for our rights does not end. We must be constantly vigilant and watchful of government and I need your help. Local politicians around our state are seizing this opportunity to grab as much power for themselves as possible. I want to protect our constitution and our rights but I need you to join me in this fight.

How can you help

First, use [ this form ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/SJvctuuog0INue-wMcKZcJC86EFQdtsTYh1DdG5aGCKKCgY218g2-b-vTHGso2FbQdOuB_p_IvG9NiuRwH41c7XHSF4MvZ91tM_a2ejSmaR4nTzXUYcHDjopOT-wVkH38mXNF9dzf24FIA0mR4neK-kQwr-Bmq8npgwGs2EMr2f29NoJpOiXHD6m6cPbzIVNT7q4kZ62xB4nkmDrmiNI28hf-_GDYsOKbxZiG-QWozqvCI4c2LlUzuquIH1Dp5B2NrI ) to report to me any violations you see. I will research these claims and expose these violations. If I can find an attorney willing to take the case we will pursue the politicians in court.

Second, help me pay for this by donating something to the cause. It takes money to fight these politicians. They are using our tax dollars against us and Michael Bloomberg is sending millions of dollars to Mississippi to destroy our constitution.

[ $5 or $10 or whatever you can afford ]( https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/JW4qi8C2tdkujmtnaM3YYr93vNyyc0zIfrzx_ZZmp4x_eWxwpzDWF2zJOp_mPpPWCvz_Z3-1jlFEcJK5_N6nsKM5h_81CAmvsPXDYBwLcu_nhwfxx0nE3jheunDn1OeJGVR1nPlFF7DJ_DRNwgUMXOXXLV-Ro3getEis8WoHLO0jswAHkjMNpsXhXgGKEwhJRXU8JCXhHZKTY497hR8CJm2_Spd9uG8lRHi3hNPte4iA ) helps us fund this battle for our rights.

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: I want to be honest, transparent, and frank about our goals.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b4/2025801545/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | there is no doubt that these past two months have looked different on the campaign trail. We have run our campaign completely online. Facebook Lives, digital broadcasts, press conferences over Twitter, phone calls, Zoom calls - you name it - all out of my attic at home. For about six weeks, we suspended all political activity. That meant no political calls from our organizing team (we did check-in calls to seniors instead), and no urgent campaign fundraising asks in these emails (we raised nearly $100,000 for charity instead). **But now we are less than four months away from the primary. And I want to be honest and transparent about our goals. We need to kick this campaign back into gear and ensure we have the resources we need to win.[So today, I'm asking for your help. Will you pitch in to help restart our operation?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b5/2025801545/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=ask3-btn5")** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly. | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b6/2025801545/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b7/2025801545/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---
[$33](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b0/2025801545/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=33&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b1/2025801545/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons")
[$100](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b2/2025801545/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons") | [OTHER](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b5/2025801545/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=ask3-btn5")
You may be asking, "Why is Joe asking for a contribution now?" Here's why:
This fight has taken on new urgency. With four months to go, it has never been more clear that we need stronger leadership in the Senate and in Washington. We need a U.S. Senator who will be here with us, on the ground in Massachusetts, fighting with every ounce of his time and energy as we recover and rebuild.
The donation you make today will go towards paying our field staff, who are going to start making calls to people all across the state, telling them the story of this campaign. It will go to our ongoing digital efforts, to make sure every voter in Massachusetts sees what Team Kennedy is all about. It will go towards mail pieces and TV ads, office space, gas, supplies, and staff - the essential components of any political campaign.
**This fight has always been community-led. And we're counting on you, now more than ever. Let's ensure we have representation that will stand up for everyone in the US Senate. Let's give Massachusetts a team who will fight with every single ounce of their might to make sure every voice is heard across this state. Let's fight together for the leadership we deserve.**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly.
[$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b6/2025801545/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b7/2025801545/VEsHBQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons")

[$100](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b2/2025801545/VEsHBg/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&refcode2=express-buttons") | [OTHER](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390666/55b66746/2014a9f7/80e51b5/2025801545/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-05-03-whynow&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&refcode2=ask3-btn5")
I know how difficult these times are, so if a donation is out of the question, that is okay. It doesn't make me any less grateful for the support, energy, attention, and inspiration that you provide this campaign every day.
Let's keep fighting. Thank you for being part of this team.

name: Trump Alerts
subject: 24 hour goal to help Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by America First Action
body:
Ever since Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, Bernie Sanders, and Nancy Pelosi endorsed Joe Biden for President, his fundraising has spiked through the roof. Now, Biden's latest scheme has Liberal Elites forking over TENS OF THOUSANDS to conference call with him. In just one event, Biden cashed in at $25,000 for just a few minutes with Liberal donors.President Trump doesn't have time to hop on endless virtual fundraisers to keep up with Biden -- he's trying to protect America.

name: Hon. Lee Quandt
subject: exporting Mowers to NH was part of the plan
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDEzNzgzNTk2MzIxMjE1OTI1JmM9ZzVkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDQ0MTMzMDImZD1qOHExejFx.FVLxwyUsu-KMynLtymVXP1N_AmtuUneD3Bj9Ln_BLQ8)
| | |
---
| |
---
""New Jersey political operative Matt Mowers has raised more than $100,000 from New Jersey donors - about one-third of his total fundraising haul - in his bid for a congressional seat in New Hampshire" "Exporting Mowers to New Hampshire was part of the plan to help Christie get a foothold into the first-in-the-nation primary." - The New Jersey Globe, April 17, 2020
---
| |
---
| Dear fellow Granite Stater, It sounds crazy saying it, but [this article from the New Jersey Globe](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDEzNzgzNTk2MzIxMjE1OTI1JmM9ZzVkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDQ0MTMzMzQmZD1hMmE1ajVm.iJueCgWYz0z3U3dnWBdKf7_g6ZJt7m1_9L1B9I02jjo) tells you all that you need to know about New Hampshire's Republican primary for US Congress. Matt Mowers was "exported to New Hampshire" and is being heavily funded by New Jersey, New York City, and Washington DC political insiders to try and buy the Republican nomination in our great state. **New Hampshire Republicans beware - candidates that move to our state just to run for office NEVER win general elections.** Here in New Hampshire we don't like being used by blue-state political insiders trying to jumpstart their careers in our "purple" state. We can beat Chris Pappas this Fall, but not with someone that needs a map to find Mount Washington! **That's why I am supporting Matt Mayberry for Congress.** Matt is a lifelong New Hampshire Republican and an Air Force Veteran. **Matt Mayberry did 94% of his fundraising here in New Hampshire. In fact, he raised almost $20,000 more in New Hampshire than Chris Pappas and more than triple what Mowers raised.** Additionally, Matt Mayberry received donations from 338 NH donors, a HUGE difference from the 25 NH residents that donated to Mowers! Matt Mayberry can beat Chris Pappas but he needs our help. [Will you help Matt continue to grow his NH Grassroots Team by pledging $15, $25 or even $100 to his campaign?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDEzNzgzNTk2MzIxMjE1OTI1JmM9ZzVkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDQ0MTMzNTQmZD12OGYxZzBo.pSID0OLssoOleMSBPZqSg3IKKzl0lU7D0HwCHaR5ZRk) Take a look at Matt's website at [MayberryForCongress.com](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDEzNzgzNTk2MzIxMjE1OTI1JmM9ZzVkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDQ0MTMzODImZD1lN3owajln.06wo4wZNj5uVlJhd43qSJTTXasbQtSXxTv_nDjoGn_8), I think that you'll agree that he is the best NEW HAMPSHIRE candidate for the job. Thank you, Hon. Lee Quandt 37 Month Combat Veteran and Former State Representative, Exeter

name: Charles Booker
subject: Why do you want to defeat Mitch McConnnell?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I know that I’m not alone in this pain I’ve felt. I know that there’s thousands of families in Kentucky and across our country who have been hurt by Mitch’s policies and poor leadership.
#
Why do you want to defeat Mitch McConnell?
**[share your story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17368826/192081735/1794933451?source=em20200504&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTIxZmQyZi0zNzhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GCrL2XFW6VhrgX-qo5E9whCPxSmR5lSY_vIb97Lpdng=&emci=d9f6cd3c-308e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ae21fd2f-378e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
* * *
I was born in 1984, 2 weeks before Mitch McConnell was elected to the Senate. **So when I say I’ve been feeling the pain of Mitch’s rule my entire life, I really mean it. **
When my family was struggling to put dinner on the table, Mitch was in the Senate pushing to slash food stamps. When I was diagnosed with diabetes and wasn’t sure how I’d afford insulin, Mitch was voting to slash health care coverage. When my cousins and neighbors became victims of our country’s epidemic of gun violence, Mitch was making backroom deals with his friends at the NRA.
Now, I’m a father of two girls and I refuse to let Mitch’s rule hurt another generation of Kentuckians. That’s why I’m in this fight.
**But I know that I’m not alone in this pain I’ve felt. I know that there are thousands of families in Kentucky and across our country who have been hurt by Mitch’s policies and poor leadership. **
These stories — your story — is what drives this movement and inspires me to be in this fight. And now that we’re down to our last full month of campaigning before our primary, I especially want to know what brings you to this fight so I can make sure your voice is heard in this campaign.
**[Will you take our short survey and let us know why you want to defeat Mitch McConnell this election? We want to hear from people across the country, especially from your community.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17368827/192081736/1794933451?source=em20200504&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTIxZmQyZi0zNzhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GCrL2XFW6VhrgX-qo5E9whCPxSmR5lSY_vIb97Lpdng=&emci=d9f6cd3c-308e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ae21fd2f-378e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**

clean_body: I know that I’m not alone in this pain I’ve felt. I know that there’s thousands of families in Kentucky and across our country who have been hurt by Mitch’s policies and poor leadership. Why do you want to defeat Mitch McConnell? I was born in 1984, 2 weeks before Mitch McConnell was elected to the Senate. So when I say I’ve been feeling the pain of Mitch’s rule my entire life, I really mean it. When my family was struggling to put dinner on the table, Mitch was in the Senate pushing to slash food stamps. When I was diagnosed with diabetes and wasn’t sure how I’d afford insulin, Mitch was voting to slash health care coverage. When my cousins and neighbors became victims of our country’s epidemic of gun violence, Mitch was making backroom deals with his friends at the NRA. Now, I’m a father of two girls and I refuse to let Mitch’s rule hurt another generation of Kentuckians. That’s why I’m in this fight. But I know that I’m not alone in this pain I’ve felt. I know that there are thousands of families in Kentucky and across our country who have been hurt by Mitch’s policies and poor leadership. These stories — your story — is what drives this movement and inspires me to be in this fight. And now that we’re down to our last full month of campaigning before our primary, I especially want to know what brings you to this fight so I can make sure your voice is heard in this campaign. Proud to be in this fight with you, Charles =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump ‘Kept His Campaign Promise’ to Stand Up to China
body:
“This isn’t the first time it has been necessary for President Trump to stand up to the Communist Chinese regime.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fce03c6810&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump ‘Kept His Campaign Promise’ to Stand Up to China**

“President Trump and his administration have done an extraordinary job in slowing the spread of the coronavirus by taking early action to ban travel with China and providing detailed guidelines to both mitigate the spread of the virus and reverse its devastating economic impact,” Andy Puzder and former Ambassador to Japan Bill Hagerty write for Fox Business.

“This isn’t the first time it has been necessary for President Trump to stand up to the Communist Chinese regime.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7cced21ce8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump issued guidelines last month to help states prepare to reopen soon. “The president has left it up to the governors to look at their own data and determine on their own when it’s time to reduce the restrictions on their citizens. This is a tremendous step in the right direction for the country,” Tim Young writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c566f2754&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “COVID-19 will undoubtedly change America as we know it, but it is also a defining moment for our first lady. For those closely watching, it seems as though she knows it and is rising to the occasion,” Jennifer Pickens writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1e983e798&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Retired Gen. Michael Flynn “was investigated during the Trump transition by anti-Trump officials at the FBI and Obama Justice Department on nebulous grounds. There was no criminal predicate for the probe . . . This isn’t how our justice system, or high politics, should work,” the [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99ee1aa93f&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac15b60004&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0135da50dd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=62ec3b36c8)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

The White House claimed Dr. Fauci testifying would be _" counterproductive."_ Likely because Dr. Fauci tells the truth and says things the White House doesn't want to hear.

**_What 's actually counterproductive is blocking and silencing scientists like Dr. Fauci amid a pandemic._**

[That is why we need your help. Can you click here and demand the White House IMMEDIATELY let Dr. Fauci testify before Congress?](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/let-dr-fauci-testify?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+we+need+your+help+Can+you+cl&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify&source=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify&refcode=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify")

| [SIGN ON](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/let-dr-fauci-testify?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify&source=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify&refcode=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify")
---

Listen, if you're shocked by this news, I'm not sure where you've been for the past three years. Trump and his administration have a tenuous relationship with facts, the truth, and science. _Whenever anyone speaks up and tells the TRUTH, Trump refuses to listen._

For example, Dr. Fauci said we needed to ramp up testing (which is 100% true), but Trump denied that assessment. _Trump probably based this off of his nonexistent understanding of infectious diseases._

**_We 've had enough -- we can't have the President waging war on science and facts while silencing Dr. Fauci._**

[Sign on and demand that the White House IMMEDIATELY let Dr. Fauci testify.](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/let-dr-fauci-testify?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Sign+on+and+demand+that+the+White+House+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify&source=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify&refcode=314_EM_PT_200504_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_FauciTestify")

body:

| | Tonight is the deadline to register to vote the in the 2020 Primary. This is the first step to winning big in the most important election of our lives. Peter, we can't sit this one out. So, we are calling on you to make sure your friends, family, neighbors, coworkers, and anyone else you know is registered. **Here are the three ways to register to vote:**
1. Register online [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17369943/192102458/-1499154792?emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDgyNDliYy0zZjhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSC-u-c9wWT8zVdydn_Iof1GaphfbFALUAu9ppVdy3M=) if you have an Indiana driver’s license or ID. Make sure you register by midnight local time.
2. You can print the [Voter Registration Application](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17369944/192102459/629425687?emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDgyNDliYy0zZjhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSC-u-c9wWT8zVdydn_Iof1GaphfbFALUAu9ppVdy3M=) and mail in the form. Any registration form postmarked on or before May 4 can be accepted if the voter is otherwise eligible.
3. You can call your county clerk. If their office is open, you can ask to pick up the form and complete it.

Will you forward this email to three people to make sure they're registered to vote by midnight? Don't forget every single Hoosier can vote by mail in the 2020 primary! For instructions on applying to vote by mail, check out our short blog post [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17369945/192102460/-893062011?emci=3285b67c-b68b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDgyNDliYy0zZjhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSC-u-c9wWT8zVdydn_Iof1GaphfbFALUAu9ppVdy3M=). _Voter outreach is funded by our 100%-grassroots backed, [Vote-by-Mail Outreach Initiative](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17369946/192102461/1745149176?refcode=VoterRegEmail&amount=12.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDgyNDliYy0zZjhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSC-u-c9wWT8zVdydn_Iof1GaphfbFALUAu9ppVdy3M=). name: Team Steel
subject: Quick comparison
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Before we go toe-to-toe in November, we felt it was important to set the record straight.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x7q26txewM09g80u9RUXDpFV9np8S-9UsNVgoA6i45x6YNaeSfMgl4gb3J1phQGJjt6PJF1MwO22IVrYDtLMoGUezt4f-W_FLrcfmKyxU7P42nxAGzl770O8ARd4Le1BTbGwPjT_soxuTwLtrFCz0jaYh0G29OfRdRADb3H0iFcnoqCIBAvGelLDqu-gEMWMCPESMNsHANzhy9OE0ynW7YsQ8AHnQx20HZri2aM7mkZ1pZy-HO0CTSWwdQjJ2swjx0l3T2ZqgWXEv-fb1bzq85o1YtNCQpm6MJIrxgS5jM_zcRUkW963iFHj3w29S2TQVVaAyS4IzRM0skjUVFU89daGgpHyZ0Cmv1Bj2jDV4OI=&c=2dBYK9dWGPCdzKWSu-gXq2APt3-mZ7UkWxJtiZftFKNvuejJrY_PZg==&ch=BA_9m6kZ9YTqArg5QDokP6RiDkH6X8pKYgB4ZHQPPLZ7xjXjoMtB7A==)
Last Monday our opponent and his team sent around an email comparing our campaign to his. But we noticed they left a few things out. Before we go toe-to-toe in November, we felt it was important to set the record straight.

Our campaign:
* Is endorsed by the Howard Jarvis Taxpayers Association for Michelle's work returning $400 million to California taxpayers.
* Has promised to stop any tax increases, oppose all new taxes, and fight on behalf of hard-working Americans struggling to make ends meet.
* Relies on the grassroots support of people like you, Friend, to flip this seat from blue to red and take back the House for Republicans.

Our opponent's campaign:
* Welcomed $4.4+ million dollars from Michael Bloomberg. Money, Bloomberg admitted, was used to buy this seat.
* Is backed by a dark money group with $10.4 million to spend before November's election despite claiming he wants to "shine a light on the dark money donors holding our nation hostage."
* _Outraised us last quarter by nearly double._

We're proud of our campaign and all that we've been able to accomplish because of our grassroots team. The Left's attacks are a testament to what we have achieved -- they're scared they'll lose to a grassroots campaign like ours. [**Can you donate now to send this toss-up race in our direction?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x7q26txewM09g80u9RUXDpFV9np8S-9UsNVgoA6i45x6YNaeSfMgl4gb3J1phQGJjt6PJF1MwO22IVrYDtLMoGUezt4f-W_FLrcfmKyxU7P42nxAGzl770O8ARd4Le1BTbGwPjT_soxuTwLtrFCz0jaYh0G29OfRdRADb3H0iFcnoqCIBAvGelLDqu-gEMWMCPESMNsHANzhy9OE0ynW7YsQ8AHnQx20HZri2aM7mkZ1pZy-HO0CTSWwdQjJ2swjx0l3T2ZqgWXEv-fb1bzq85o1YtNCQpm6MJIrxgS5jM_zcRUkW963iFHj3w29S2TQVVaAyS4IzRM0skjUVFU89daGgpHyZ0Cmv1Bj2jDV4OI=&c=2dBYK9dWGPCdzKWSu-gXq2APt3-mZ7UkWxJtiZftFKNvuejJrY_PZg==&ch=BA_9m6kZ9YTqArg5QDokP6RiDkH6X8pKYgB4ZHQPPLZ7xjXjoMtB7A==) | | [**DONATE $10**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x7q26txewM09g80u9RUXDpFV9np8S-9UsNVgoA6i45x6YNaeSfMgl1zZyNMSZ2mdpPobKmi-BUCK9zHlfzWJa1IDEPZtCKkrGSDUb1xUAuvO7-99S6HbWmhw5kfH3k3GICvI3KQ7wViCONBNe-uVpLw5q5QluKZNEANSR5YLLNathVbZ82wRgbZJ1dDhHhYEDUlZZ3J4Si7M3vhsxctiuqtyqjcgZZzhPNRvj1HZCdC6t-cbkz8ollCMnbfbIGkgAGbrVn7iXSAhlxXQNedm0RRpML2XHKMEPcow9b3Al5Kh0eU7KXjiUyejI5v5iRro_ea-9Z4D17UXmxPaHQkLqXZPyGh5Qg7KLLfhNiu1R18=&c=2dBYK9dWGPCdzKWSu-gXq2APt3-mZ7UkWxJtiZftFKNvuejJrY_PZg==&ch=BA_9m6kZ9YTqArg5QDokP6RiDkH6X8pKYgB4ZHQPPLZ7xjXjoMtB7A==)

clean_body: Before we go toe-to-toe in November, we felt it was important to set the record straight. == Last Monday our opponent and his team sent around an email comparing our campaign to his. But we noticed they left a few things out. Before we go toe-to-toe in November, we felt it was important to set the record straight. Our campaign: Is endorsed by the Howard Jarvis Taxpayers Association for Michelle's work returning $400 million to California taxpayers. Has promised to stop any tax increases, oppose all new taxes, and fight on behalf of hard-working Americans struggling to make ends meet. Relies on the grassroots support of people like you, Friend, to flip this seat from blue to red and take back the House for Republicans. Our opponent's campaign: Welcomed $4.4+ million dollars from Michael Bloomberg. Money, Bloomberg admitted, was used to buy this seat. Is backed by a dark money group with $10.4 million to spend before November's election despite claiming he wants to "shine a light on the dark money donors holding our nation hostage." Outraised us last quarter by nearly double. We're proud of our campaign and all that we've been able to accomplish because of our grassroots team. The Left's attacks are a testament to what we have achieved -- they're scared they'll lose to a grassroots campaign like ours. == | | == | | == | == | | == If we stop now, we don't stand a chance. But if we keep fighting, we'll come out on top. Thank you, Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220 Huntington Beach, CA 92647 == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: John Cornyn
subject: Texas falling for BIDEN?❗
body:
Friend, I recently saw a very disturbing poll.
Now, I don't always believe these things. There's room for plenty of error. But a poll that shows JOE BIDEN leading President Trump IN TEXAS?
That's cause for alarm. [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5amwMk4-VBjyWyE12FdymcV0G5fBU_fk79jhdD04IkSHkUq9JD80TSS23jSkGa_kgoU6aW_E0QmfiAV2hdKYXtalG4e-zM1mqL9IUECk3acHyVhIk6MNdBfnZK8lNdNduJvUmCSm2CWz1eegt14fTzgT3LTLqtvLVXKTVi5wU96PXn1BtLcGkCQKxGFwQu7kvsexOgcV5nD4cdm9p2weJrP6wF5XzFeGowJDSiBLljPG2OXUl3IsJ9wxmWzV2PY_JZ1CDAU948e0K-EqqelYyUJ8moRZP60iVsFdM3xw0HByatxwXN36TcKnQ=&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) [ **DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5amwMk4-VBjyWyE12FdymcV0G5fBU_fk79jhdD04IkSHkUq9JD80TSS23jSkGa_kgoU6aW_E0QmfiAV2hdKYXtalG4e-zM1mqL9IUECk3acHyVhIk6MNdBfnZK8lNdNduJvUmCSm2CWz1eegt14fTzgT3LTLqtvLVXKTVi5wU96PXn1BtLcGkCQKxGFwQu7kvsexOgcV5nD4cdm9p2weJrP6wF5XzFeGowJDSiBLljPG2OXUl3IsJ9wxmWzV2PY_JZ1CDAU948e0K-EqqelYyUJ8moRZP60iVsFZXuEfUW-OdHuOoZfi5Q40E=&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) Conservative Texas? Falling for Joe Biden? I thought it had to be a mistake. But this is real, Friend.
Big-money liberals are spending BIG in the Lone Star State, and they won't stop until they run President Trump out of the White House, and me out of the Senate.
That's why I'm calling on you to make an immediate contribution to the EMERGENCY TRUMP DEFENSE FUND where every single dollar will be put towards defending our president and keeping Texas RED.
**[Will you chip in just $25 now and make sure this poll never comes true on election day?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5amwMk4-VBjyWyE12FdymcV0G5fBU_fk79jhdD04IkSHkUq9JD80TSS23jSkGa_kgoU6aW_E0QmfiAV2hdKYXtalG4e-zM1mqL9IUECk3acHyVhIk6MNdBfnZK8lNdNduJvUmCSm2CWz1eegt14fTzgT3LTLqtvLVXKTVi5wU96PXn1BtLcGkCQKxGFwQu7kvsexOgcV5nD4cdm9p2weJrP6wF5XzFeGowJDSiBLljPG2OXUl3IsJ9wxmWzV2PY_JZ1CDAU948e0K-EqqelYyUJ8moRZP60iVsFXPWdBy035VBuAKvIfOe7-Y=&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==)** [ **EMERGENCY TRUMP DEFENSE FUND** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5amwMk4-VBjyWyE12FdymcV0G5fBU_fk79jhdD04IkSHkUq9JD80TSS23jSkGa_kgoU6aW_E0QmfiAV2hdKYXtalG4e-zM1mqL9IUECk3acHyVhIk6MNdBfnZK8lNdNduJvUmCSm2CWz1eegt14fTzgT3LTLqtvLVXKTVi5wU96PXn1BtLcGkCQKxGFwQu7kvsexOgcV5nD4cdm9p2weJrP6wF5XzFeGowJDSiBLljPG2OXUl3IsJ9wxmWzV2PY_JZ1CDAU948e0K-EqqelYyUJ8moRZP60iVsFbpJRTvpq1gtaW8fG6yQrzw=&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) We need to act quickly if we're going to right this ship.
Friend, you and I both know that Texas is for President Trump. We have his back. We're proud to defend him.
We can't let the Radical Left get away with their efforts to turn Texas against him.
We must defend the President join me in doing so NOW: **[https://secure.winred.com/john-cornyn/djt-defense](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5amwMk4-VBjyWyE12FdymcV0G5fBU_fk79jhdD04IkSHkUq9JD80TSS23jSkGa_kgoU6aW_E0QmfiAV2hdKYXtalG4e-zM1mqL9IUECk3acHyVhIk6MNdBfnZK8lNdNduJvUmCSm2CWz1eegt14fTzgT3LTLqtvLVXKTVi5wU96PXn1BtLcGkCQKxGFwQu7kvsexOgcV5nD4cdm9p2weJrP6wF5XzFeGowJDSiBLljPG2OXUl3IsJ9wxmWzV2PY_JZ1CDAU948e0K-EqqelYyUJ8moRZP60iVsFeA-KLAWaoQUqrUnt-j8iDE=&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==)** John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, were one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, were glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5am6YPGgV40DCzl4NGcQljCXre9a3n1-ZXe5IMYulU5s6dsAN9FVXvV-IONucs8LngI2_Ux5cl9i3dIGaj9-EJpC9gZQaTfWobfDpmW7umZh3whuKXZhS8adA=&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5amzWngri5wRKwzj4oNGdQvu1kBnmYrPz5sJNH2P-Qtq2kHwwAzbfc_yBp3nfHx-rDJet4vX4g_7bPx6gsnY6KlTjcsPAz8jAv2HnV9yDFlOTX&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5am6YPGgV40DCz7BxjaKcMJv0XMBHL1uIY0j8yu137AeiL1sSLW1g3HqAPcqEfZKxXwsHd4AJZqXa9waWna4C3WOKR7L6A0HGDKYZq0zIMzoSS1ECeTw0zhd1HV72HR_qSOA==&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LVHXnWbFPDnLPlEbBoiKdNMr29a4j3eQScRJJdEjnkYHrBntKP5am00gcUEgbzpGImABub13yr2zr3z2EiNEHHlAhcL6m7SbYguFUmbge0FHIquFL0N0gBjALGAUIEAr4vQTEimbh3vTV6oTpS7gkmgKidPnTD6G_DSQ6k3Lv90ucxkUwYdSFin7wVrvfRoLtlWgFY6ozXMlTvTQo0_X9fPdTBUwn7GLk89xQB6sKmMXNqkJXgn5Y3WEDAwZL-ge-53gmcF3iOnvbrsdjVzWUIcpx5hTWeSraCKY5scsxUTTsUJ0klViyQ==&c=HlyCjrN14Od0y4o3HvEXeOvvlq91FnLXxWXmpBLK9-MoEK-AjCt0Hw==&ch=SRYGE6YOhTHy68vm6Xda9rMFbFhrmrQFkcHIad5hJLuQjNU7RJvmUQ==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I made a promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
When I announced I was running for Senate, I made a promise that I wouldn't take a dime of corporate PAC money. Some said that decision would hurt our ability to raise the money it would take to win.
But then, seconds after our announcement, Vicki, a database administrator for Tucson made a $3 contribution to our campaign. Moments later, Carolyn, an artist from Bisbee, Arizona donated $50 more.
And just like that ... we took off. And since that day we have raised more money from small-dollar donors than almost anyone running for Senate this cycle.
But now we face our biggest challenge since launch, and I need your help. Because we can't come up short.
Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans have pledged to spend nearly $15 million to defeat our campaign. And our only chance to fight back is people like Vicki, and Carolyn, and you pitching in $3 at a time. So, Senator Hassan said that I should ask you:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today as a way of saying there is NO WAY we are going to let Washington Republicans buy this Senate seat?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc433/2a380d31/23f424ff/f09f15/3549299536/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUwNF9td2g0bWsxX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20200504_mwh4mk1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
I'm very proud of the way we are funding this campaign, and you should be too. When we launched, I could have never imagined the small-dollar support we've received since that day. But we have to keep going. It's how we'll win come November.
All my best,
Mark Kelly

clean_body: Hi there -- When I announced I was running for Senate, I made a promise that I wouldn't take a dime of corporate PAC money. Some said that decision would hurt our ability to raise the money it would take to win. But then, seconds after our announcement, Vicki, a database administrator for Tucson made a $3 contribution to our campaign. Moments later, Carolyn, an artist from Bisbee, Arizona donated $50 more. And just like that ... we took off. And since that day we have raised more money from small-dollar donors than almost anyone running for Senate this cycle. But now we face our biggest challenge since launch, and I need your help. Because we can't come up short. Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans have pledged to spend nearly $15 million to defeat our campaign. And our only chance to fight back is people like Vicki, and Carolyn, and you pitching in $3 at a time. So, Senator Hassan said that I should ask you: "" I'm very proud of the way we are funding this campaign, and you should be too. When we launched, I could have never imagined the small-dollar support we've received since that day. But we have to keep going. It's how we'll win come November. All my best, Mark Kelly ""

name: Tina Smith
subject: Re: Video call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this challenging time. It’s hard to believe just how much our lives have changed in such a short while. But one thing has remained constant: The support of this incredible grassroots team. After missing our April fundraising goal, we officially closed the gap and hit our target over the weekend. Folks like you stepped up to chip in a few dollars to help our campaign make up for this temporary lapse, and I’m so grateful you did. **Thank you.** At the end of this week, I will hop on a video call with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the month. But before I do, I wanted to check in with you because it’s important to me that I get your feedback too. **[Will you take a minute to let me know what issues matter most to you in this race? I want to know what your priorities are and what keeps you up at night, so I really hope you’ll take a moment to fill out my survey today. Your feedback is important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17370499/192115833/-279579047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmM2NTUxNy00NThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcfjUexrvOvUIb-QAqvhy5whN6eYx2-lprNNaPkX3X0=&emci=1ac65517-458e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1bc65517-458e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17370500/192115834/-279579047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmM2NTUxNy00NThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcfjUexrvOvUIb-QAqvhy5whN6eYx2-lprNNaPkX3X0=&emci=1ac65517-458e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1bc65517-458e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)

Thanks for weighing in, I’ll be in touch soon.

name: Jeff Van Drew
subject: China and the World Health Organization must be held accountable!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Drew for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats refuse to work with President Trump and are even condemning President Trump for cutting funding to the WHO because they deliberately downplayed the Coronavirus coming out of China.
Dear Friend,

body:
Hope you're having a good start to your week. I think I can speak for the entire campaign team when I say we're kicking off this first Monday of the month on a GREAT note -- and that's thanks to you.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dw2EtdMTXpd5pa_-1hA4fIck1Ebkt79bFWZ6Vq5nv8Y=/QwYes8JGf5rFL92FZ0Ihhk9AQwhPXBBWEBGlmgSXPsA=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dw2EtdMTXpd5pa_-1hA4fIck1Ebkt79bFWZ6Vq5nv8Y=/VthTfVqW_TlMxS-mW8Ktd6B7tpug4e2pNUqO1AZudUU=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

Hope you're having a good start to your week. I think I can speak for the entire campaign team when I say we're kicking off this first Monday of the month on a GREAT note -- and that's thanks to you, friend.

Your support last month helped us meet our April fundraising goal, which means we won't need to scale back any of our May plans due to a budget shortage. I truly cannot thank you enough for helping us reach this benchmark, and for your continued belief in the power of this grassroots campaign team.

Thank you again for your support friends,

Sri

PS: [**We 're still collecting responses for our COVID-19 survey. If you haven't had time to take it, please consider giving it three minutes today. Your feedback will help inform our ongoing community work.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dw2EtdMTXpd5pa_-1hA4fIck1Ebkt79bFWZ6Vq5nv8Y=/QwYes8JGf5rFL92FZ0Ihhk9AQwhPXBBWEBGlmgSXPsA=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dw2EtdMTXpd5pa_-1hA4fIck1Ebkt79bFWZ6Vq5nv8Y=/F4mIDaxbzprVEEeJkR8Ok5VEzHkRABxN5y0eq0nZUI4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.05.04_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Our message to health care workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Last month, we asked all of you to share messages of gratitude for the brave healthcare workers who are not just at the forefront of this pandemic, but are also sacrificing time with their families, as they work extremely hard to keep all of us healthy and safe during this pandemic.

We received a number of touching responses sharing words of appreciation and encouragement for our doctors, nurses, and first responders, and we decided to put together a video to share with our community during National Nurses Week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371537/192142537/2094483369?gpsid=8_122_12696&refcode=em20_200504_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200504_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIyNzYzNS01MThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CLb-jIiMPkX2I8XCceqcXjAu4W0GEsq46KWGo6bAMY=)
**[These are extraordinary times, and we believe that our health care professionals deserve an extra thanks for their bravery and dedication. If you have a moment, take a look at the video we've put together to show our gratitude.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371538/192142538/2094483369?gpsid=8_122_12696&refcode=em20_200504_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200504_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIyNzYzNS01MThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CLb-jIiMPkX2I8XCceqcXjAu4W0GEsq46KWGo6bAMY=)**

My team and I are focusing our attention on healthcare during National Nurses Week, which is why I'll be hosting a virtual town hall on healthcare this Wednesday at 6 pm CT with a very special guest, former Secretary of Health and Human Services, Kathleen Sebelius. I hope you will join us for a thoughtful discussion and Q & A on our health system, and my plan to ensure all Kansans have access to affordable healthcare. **[You can click here to RSVP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371539/192142539/-1164011296?fbclid=IwAR2SFx33itqhZNp4wRWhPoJzsK1E7laiJbTcFvJXRC2B8OSHJcwGKWPk63A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIyNzYzNS01MThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CLb-jIiMPkX2I8XCceqcXjAu4W0GEsq46KWGo6bAMY=&emci=952156be-148e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f4b27635-518e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9593007)**

I am so grateful for the health care professionals fighting on the front lines of this pandemic. Their courage and compassion during this difficult time has truly been inspiring.

Thanks,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371540/192142540/-1952513085?gpsid=8_122_12683&refcode=em20_200504_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200504_hcvid_fnd_gq_act__mdli_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIyNzYzNS01MThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CLb-jIiMPkX2I8XCceqcXjAu4W0GEsq46KWGo6bAMY=)

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/952156be-148e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/f4b27635-518e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGIyNzYzNS01MThlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CLb-jIiMPkX2I8XCceqcXjAu4W0GEsq46KWGo6bAMY=&id=111940568&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

# Virtual Meet and Greet tonight!
Tonight we will be having our very first virtual meet and greet! I wanted to remind you about the event because you won't want to miss it. Grab your ticket[ here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0edc732243&e=140a9b81e7)!

**Our amazing lineup of guest speakers includes _ Laura Greene Welch from the Illinois National Organization for Women_, Leni Manaa-Hoppenworth from Indivisible Illinois, _Jennifer Welch from Planned Parenthood Illinois_ , Paul Kendrick from Rust Belt Rising, and _Democratic nominee for Congress in Illinois' 3rd district Marie Newman!_**

We'll be discussing just how important this race is, and why we need all hands on deck to pull it off!

Hope to "see" you there!

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Monthly Newsletter -- via Team Rita
subject: Rita Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4VsbefgFep5kUA9zaDv3BkadWmN8gfXms8CvOz2ILds=/I794U6FERG_QfG-4ZAe0q7OLDB0ls0Qcu9jvZbrrQ0w=) _Welcome to the May edition of The Rita Review! April continued to be a busy month as we maneuvered to social distance and respond to the ongoing effects of the coronavirus. Nonetheless, Rita 's schedule was filled with Zoom meetings and engaging conversations about the state of Iowa. _ **Mask Taskforce -- Clinton County Iowa** Rita participated in many meetings this month, which allowed her to meet with several local heroes, including Dianne Prichard with Clinton County Hometown Pride. The Clinton County Mask Taskforce is a group of over 150 Iowans who have stepped up to sew masks to respond to the desperate need for protective medical equipment. Thank you to these incredible people! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4VsbefgFep5kUA9zaDv3BkadWmN8gfXms8CvOz2ILds=/0vZXmwm5YPlOcCLod083-ESernMQL_0dyzqynSdzM_I=) **Passover and Easter** Everyone continued learning and adapting to the times while celebrating Passover and Easter. While it felt unusual and difficult, Rita reflected on our rituals and community while with her family on the farm. We will get through this together. **Staying in touch with supporters and volunteers** We wouldn't even be here if it wasn't for you, so we want to thank all of you who have taken the time to meet with Rita online. Below are a few of our meetings throughout the month.

The first is with Rita's hard-working volunteer team, who meet online to continue training. Next is the Decatur County Democrats monthly meeting that Rita joined in on. Even while physical distancing, Rita is still staying inspired by our strong local leaders! And finally, Rita checked in with the Marion County Dems, Muscatine County Dems, and Clinton County Dems to talk about the issues that matter to them.

Thank you to everyone who took the time to join us! **Rita in the press** The Clinton Herald published an interview with Rita highlighting the work she does to stay in touch with Iowans. 'Hart represented parts of Clinton and Scott counties as an Iowa State Senator from January of 2013 through January 2019. "That's how I like to work for the district," Hart said. "Showing up. Working together to solve common problems."' Read more about how your voices motivate Rita [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4VsbefgFep5kUA9zaDv3BkadWmN8gfXms8CvOz2ILds=/E9AjTsH07d1asST-K7azulhyJ8BPgKo3ePVtJ70n4KI=?fbclid=IwAR2Y9Rm_pzT_84cVFjSzWjhKwwtYcT85c6TRkRFDNyi-goj14LdIL8ToE3Y). [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4VsbefgFep5kUA9zaDv3BkadWmN8gfXms8CvOz2ILds=/E9AjTsH07d1asST-K7azulhyJ8BPgKo3ePVtJ70n4KI=?fbclid=IwAR2Y9Rm_pzT_84cVFjSzWjhKwwtYcT85c6TRkRFDNyi-goj14LdIL8ToE3Y) **Effects of COVID-19 crisis on our schools with Dawn Gannon** Rita and Dawn Gannon, from the Calamus-Wheatland School District, had an extended chat regarding the effects of the COVID-19 on Iowa Schools. They discussed the state of schools, access to technology, and several different perspectives of the students, staff, and parents. This conversation was a great deep dive into everything impacting our schools at the moment. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4VsbefgFep5kUA9zaDv3BkadWmN8gfXms8CvOz2ILds=/ZgbiQZQH3lybXr3m58Gg4g3cS2mgnNrzLLb4gERmBf4=) _That 's it for this month's Rita Review. We're building our coalition by listening to folks throughout our district, so we'll have lots of updates in the coming months. Thanks for reading._ \- Team Rita __ __ __ __ __ __ __| Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
__
__Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States__
__If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4VsbefgFep5kUA9zaDv3BkadWmN8gfXms8CvOz2ILds=/MPZiVStkVLS5rGIRTJRpXy2xg_jXtZ00yuBKXt8zJXE=).__

__** **__

They discussed the state of schools, access to technology, and several different perspectives of the students, staff, and parents. This conversation was a great deep dive into everything impacting our schools at the moment. = That 's it for this month's Rita Review. We're building our coalition by listening to folks throughout our district, so we'll have lots of updates in the coming months. Thanks for reading. \- Team Rita | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland IA 52777 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

| | Peter, **There's a reason that Roll Call has rated Kendra Horn as the most vulnerable incumbent in the House of Representatives.**

There's also a reason that National Journal has rated OK-5 as the **#1 take-back district in the country** this year.

**Kendra Horn has been nothing short of a Pelosi rubber-stamp:**
* Strict gun control
* Open borders
* Amnesty for illegal aliens
* Wreckless government spending

This is who represents us in Washington. **A radical liberal Democrat**.

When I get to Washington, I’m going to fight for Oklahoma, not become part of the D.C. insiders club. We need someone who will push for **strong border security, protect the Second Amendment, and restore healthcare freedom** by restricting government control over your medical decisions.
