name: Margaret Good
subject: Our unemployment system is broken—help us fix it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Florida’s unemployment system is broken.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371768/192146366/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDg2NjQ5NC01MzhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2EIR5eTA6Isi63j8gltrcSWWHPyB6c4Rovcc0UGQwE=&emci=266fbf64-328e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=90866494-538e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

Florida’s unemployment system is broken. It was designed to make it hard for people to get benefits in the first place, and now we are over six weeks into this pandemic and many laid-off Floridians are still waiting for their first check and many, many more have yet to receive the funding from the CARES Act.

This is unacceptable, and I have been working every day to hold Governor DeSantis and the Department of Economic Opportunity accountable for failing Florida workers. I’ve called on the U.S. Department of Labor to intervene to get Floridians their benefits. Now, I need _your_ help.

**[Can you add your name to our petition to demand Tallahassee fix the unemployment system now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371769/192146367/-598278188?contactdata=Tv4NpYPvImslozYmUTqK1cmO%2BoT66ivzycfgGN%2BDcK92UtyM6gqRXujluuWj4pRgqvcLBmMDLwXvJNz4Q4j8IZmVj%2B5eMos6I9JT5y%2BSsm3dOtcHB1%2B6Bhf%2BdGY434ZzMYan%2BTfvKoGU7bqurgRdHg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDg2NjQ5NC01MzhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2EIR5eTA6Isi63j8gltrcSWWHPyB6c4Rovcc0UGQwE=&emci=266fbf64-328e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=90866494-538e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

For weeks, I have been calling for a special session to allow the legislature to address the failures of the Governor and our executive branch. Last week, a number of my colleagues joined together to put more pressure on the legislature to go into a special session.

Even as Florida takes the first steps in re-opening, many out of work Floridians are being left behind and need this crucial assistance.

**[Will you join us in pressing for a special session?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371770/192146368/-598278188?contactdata=Tv4NpYPvImslozYmUTqK1cmO%2BoT66ivzycfgGN%2BDcK92UtyM6gqRXujluuWj4pRgqvcLBmMDLwXvJNz4Q4j8IZmVj%2B5eMos6I9JT5y%2BSsm3dOtcHB1%2B6Bhf%2BdGY434ZzMYan%2BTfvKoGU7bqurgRdHg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDg2NjQ5NC01MzhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2EIR5eTA6Isi63j8gltrcSWWHPyB6c4Rovcc0UGQwE=&emci=266fbf64-328e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=90866494-538e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

I’m committed to doing everything I can to ensure Floridians are protected, and with your help, I will continue to fight for working families in Washington next year.

Thank you,

Margaret Good | [Sign on!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17371771/192146369/-598278188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDg2NjQ5NC01MzhlLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2EIR5eTA6Isi63j8gltrcSWWHPyB6c4Rovcc0UGQwE=&emci=266fbf64-328e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=90866494-538e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)

subject: Dems won’t put America First for you

body:
Arizona is the most important battleground state in the country- will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or $100 NOW to protect it from a victory for the Radical Left?
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EQXQRtIcNgEk2QeC6q2LgpfUAsXW_tFvGCcQVLKDim-Fl2f71tGXCNxMxQaqOjPS0JedTqnC42n02RbJt9f9JtU3N1lYPiLXc83BkuJOa21f0P9y0EcUutM6q9UIN-QMY2kbAB9YQRVXYuzweHoQQi3Dc83S1uwZQ9SeeJOXfqbSZP5Noksy_4KEbk4ZRlFUZws32I6htjN8ITYmK9PC--umSZk9cCYS_-RAuRdda68nAmmYPZILe3qBoHFqDKnRNm2Z_RbB0xqCiJjWTZtFjDNOb0h9x3ZFDchOuHcXvTXy20t-dkj80eAdKT3yzZBlv9igRWBQ0HgmT1NqIFx005TZIII1mxjhyZDUrKsWtnbeQjhzyjlNeN1SXbwzqIZWgB6ZKtq3yUQGea7z_YW7RXhZFstBsIzg&c=RhaubLSyOTl-SS652ElWe6zn67veSwG-DT1FsZ5P6SXLrlqFx4Freg==&ch=srqMXw-qRLY_yI4eVMPJwfQvnVdO_AH37ft1CkPqW6Vmg97bJVvILA==)
Friend,

As a member of President Trump's taskforce to reopen the economy, I am working to ensure the health and safety of the American people while also looking to rebuild our economy.

Democrats have done **NOTHING** but obstruct and delay all of the work my Republican colleagues and I have done for you in the Senate in the hopes of scoring cheap political points.

While relief for small business relief has FINALLY passed the Senate, Democrats in the Senate, led by Chuck Schumer, are not going to stop their campaign of obstruction. **No matter what President Trump or Republicans do, Democrats will obstruct, delay, and derail - even if it hurts our economy and job market.**

_**Can you imagine how inefficient the Senate would be if it were led by the obstructionist Democrat party?** If Democrats flip Arizona, this nightmare could become a reality._ [**Rush a donation of just $25 NOW to protect against blue wave and protect my seat in the Senate >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EQXQRtIcNgEk2QeC6q2LgpfUAsXW_tFvGCcQVLKDim-Fl2f71tGXCNxMxQaqOjPSfx21SBbH7GFMuLBgysHON8ri2dR4F3rmO5QFV_-fEczHnBjScqRrYMN3EQ0Srx3VGpC2amwtPiVNwDNL6j61ixs2tdAdvQrePRMCx1Q8oL3pVIBg548MBg9wsFWWzToGFAd51Z3F737FjJ5gdZVTpwxZONSSFBKLxZoNeZMWS-JqfN9KK1JVDWtgccsYZc868QWtYObUjY_BFTFCLZfpfmIRJoQU_mqfnQV3M4X8dnnyv0BER4A2Lg2Qhsqs20F9Wk_XBYnJkvh1FciNUwITwUA1OUCuybJYVK80b7fiuKHgEUDb4wQoEyAYEFwt_BADmU4kcFZ1nrsPcGRZQloggREzfXS3gEIDua60_8rfTSfpO1TtJIT0ig==&c=RhaubLSyOTl-SS652ElWe6zn67veSwG-DT1FsZ5P6SXLrlqFx4Freg==&ch=srqMXw-qRLY_yI4eVMPJwfQvnVdO_AH37ft1CkPqW6Vmg97bJVvILA==)

My opponent was handpicked by Schumer and would be just another one of Schumer's puppets if Arizona turns blue. We need to keep American first and focus on what Americans need. Democrats have put partisanship above progress time after time, and they can't be trusted to control the Senate.

**We must keep Arizona red or President Trump 's agenda could come to a screeching halt. Arizona is the top Senate race in the country.** [**Will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or $100 NOW to protect it from a victory for the Democrat Machine?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EQXQRtIcNgEk2QeC6q2LgpfUAsXW_tFvGCcQVLKDim-Fl2f71tGXCNxMxQaqOjPSKaOVIVTQX82JrT7bAkOHsTj7p1jRDqrRy3K3dcGjnGedhsVv1vUrzS_8xXouiDvC1bjsJmAE43RvjCDpad4mg96SMV4uDohy3ZYeqxbozkvOiZto0Rp1Rdf2UDkThqM1qoXZ6P6nEvAJgutRdNsP_BhAavlkO4iHilfy8qe1gyixda-3wsDt04Svqy73LE2bblguIoHAhxXmvx017RMjIeGA8zINRFV57nSD3v9b4aBWP6_jjQ_0d-v0IwblCTZY6eqe_zf1qCPYtTDB8PNiMv_G_fEYJst6VEmndXOlkcQ98uhBD4D4aG4WghEey0vYzqMSA8jhk4rB5hlxmyJG5EJyMezXv4k5&c=RhaubLSyOTl-SS652ElWe6zn67veSwG-DT1FsZ5P6SXLrlqFx4Freg==&ch=srqMXw-qRLY_yI4eVMPJwfQvnVdO_AH37ft1CkPqW6Vmg97bJVvILA==)

In Service,

Martha McSally
[**DONATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EQXQRtIcNgEk2QeC6q2LgpfUAsXW_tFvGCcQVLKDim-Fl2f71tGXCNxMxQaqOjPSDz_dKrfzdIYl035wiuR2wnJalgxZVKyZtZUYdKCcQg8CaEHpqmlRjVglXsxwR_Za9IY6QOl8bApKvgPler3jfBqf3eoKiJrncew9911kKMRn0PJN0kS1OlHovrwhLXUGIbxcx-OK4AaxKkiXYD2YcFMHSy2J--0-8M6XKi_Ui8KzD-cAJWGhd5cv8cBkYLldMLR4gZ8Lb9D5WhtLNVZPT2jowkJ3JKagElZwHBMt7PrFmdt7I-JT6bmKqjMlgRqTYU_251a2iGFsudLumznn0F5RPQpzlKG749CcL4DFSE8ib5KpKoq2S-cEptREQhfrNC_KWKkSVxjMj6Xh3ERuBLgfoIQPV9IgSRecHYQNPo4=&c=RhaubLSyOTl-SS652ElWe6zn67veSwG-DT1FsZ5P6SXLrlqFx4Freg==&ch=srqMXw-qRLY_yI4eVMPJwfQvnVdO_AH37ft1CkPqW6Vmg97bJVvILA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: The Latest on Spicer&Co 📺
body:
The media's double standard, transportation in COVID, and more...

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F6f91b8f3953f%2Fthe-latest-on-spicerco&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F6f91b8f3953f%2Fthe-latest-on-spicerco&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1493a4cc63&e=f6564bbe3b Forward (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1493a4cc63&e=f6564bbe3b)

** Big Week at Spicer&Co
------------------------------------------------------------
We had some great segments this week on Spicer&Co.

We covered everything from transportation during and after coronavirus with Secretary Elaine Chao (https://youtu.be/2fLzAGuMqvw?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) , how we should be responding to China post-COVID (https://youtu.be/v3htI80G_i0?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) with Congressman Mark Walker, the media's hypocrisy and double standard (https://youtu.be/KtWbEib4-L8?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) in covering Joe Biden's accuser, and even had country star Charlie Daniels (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CzAUgR9sns4&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) talking about his mission to help the veteran community during coronavirus.

Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) and check out some of these interviews.

We're back tonight at 6p on Newsmax talking to the House Minority Whip Rep. Steve Scalise about Congress coming back to town, the "new normal" post-coronavirus, and more.

I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here (https://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) .

https://youtu.be/6-PMrs2zeGc?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193
The Weekly Wrap of our topics and guests from Spicer&Co. Check out clips from our interview w Sec. Elaine Chao, Rep. Mark Walker, coverage of the media's hypocrisy in covering Joe Biden, and even Charlie Daniels.

** Help Support the Fight Against Pacreatic Cancer
------------------------------------------------------------

This month I've teamed up with Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193)

In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer (https://seanspicer.com/giving-back/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk has been canceled. So instead you can get a Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) shoutout from me and it will still benefit a good cause.

Check out Cameo here (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) and learn more about PanCan here (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) .

__________

#GivingTuesdayNow

Tomorrow is #GivingTuesdayNow, a global movement to come together during COVID19, learn more about it here (https://now.givingtuesday.org?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) .

If you're looking for a cause to support, two other groups that I support are The Independence Fund (https://www.independencefund.org?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) and The Yellow Ribbon Fund (https://yellowribbonfund.org?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) .

Both of these groups serve our veteran community in different ways and are
great organizations.

Leading America Update

In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=1493a4cc63-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_04_02_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-1493a4cc63-68212193) !

Thanks,

Sean

clean_body: The media's double standard, transportation in COVID, and more... Share () Forward () Big Week at Spicer&Co We had some great segments this week on Spicer&Co. We covered everything from transportation during and after coronavirus with Secretary Elaine Chao () , how we should be responding to China post-COVID () with Congressman Mark Walker, the media's hypocrisy and double standard () in covering Joe Biden's accuser, and even had country star Charlie Daniels () talking about his mission to help the veteran community during coronavirus. Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel () and check out some of these interviews. We're back tonight at 6p on Newsmax talking to the House Minority Whip Rep. Steve Scalise about Congress coming back to town, the "new normal" post-coronavirus, and more. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here () . The Weekly Wrap of our topics and guests from Spicer&Co. Check out clips from our interview w Sec. Elaine Chao, Rep. Mark Walker, coverage of the media's hypocrisy in covering Joe Biden, and even Charlie Daniels. Help Support the Fight Against Pacreatic Cancer This month I've teamed up with Cameo () , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. () In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer () , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk has been canceled. So instead you can get a Cameo () shoutout from me and it will still benefit a good cause. Check out Cameo here () and learn more about PanCan here () . #GivingTuesdayNow Tomorrow is #GivingTuesdayNow, a global movement to come together during COVID19, learn more about it here () . If you're looking for a cause to support, two other groups that I support are The Independence Fund () and The Yellow Ribbon Fund () . Both of these groups serve our veteran community in different ways and are great organizations. Leading America Update In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward. It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now. Pre-order it now here () ! Thanks, Sean ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2020 RigWil LLC, All rights reserved.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New Washington Examiner OpEd: Politicizing business is bad for business
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=da4fe52f60ea4901ab067301ef14072c&_e=JLTsM6wuLOS8_2z9zMaI0tP4r_t4ETO4ksMV859SOLxFjPwQzXvmfrXOpA_hAWusgK_jN4mTZYyFBuptZOonbTShs4lkzlf28W5HRUH2IorggiuWS0ETSTRFyZEl0roMR_KL-TXcmVn0Vk45W5rOxnhaIFrJAdW8olPGMpA6E2hdSMFXZltprUV0wf9o2coHXWbPEEPKrHOEnHAkUIJ5l0egWY2S7rGGDHZYa4LZvdgse1bGdqbELYIAEmWlRAInWnVMQkGtwDHfok0bnagDGw%3D%3D) I hope you had a chance to read my new piece in the Washington Examiner, "Politicizing business is bad for business." Corporate America may view virtue-signaling as an inexpensive way to connect with younger customers and workers and build brand strength. They may be correct. Yet, corporate leaders may want to reconsider the more controversial steps they are taking and their strange political bedfellows. [Click here to read the entire article.](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=da4fe52f60ea4901ab067301ef14072c&_e=JLTsM6wuLOS8_2z9zMaI0lgejepHHMtd3Ep364g_7RCzhpZ1E7jChb22T6gZDc-tmJuzOz90cwg0eI21Hf8g-Uqs8gYOVV1lcJa7ZXc0ixvlT9l2L_ce5Xg3OtJnMBKJAK8INzPj8G_KaViu_skcIg1KBVfBAU5nVMsaJpuIiNNtTa-fZ975DUIYLxKQriox_cdvu1X9WdSP-EixQKi5_1VqDNbKxA_W6eozrlLjTa6gsZrybEkhJwY8R58-16Lu3-rhWj3IdLQ-Se0B-ZJqXkh0jDDloFEHavT0v3ea6rnVydezvqx1s53QEwVBjCQeMrYWlQ87yvzYHFM3BSLJG70G2tvtXUykuLcnaxeMQvhlyQI08uA7TzS_lKJs2kZO41PJiMxfDzA0sUihyCju5Miyo8DUmhB6_Xr225eHvICUXTsJR7SVaRrgUMk6WLld) Sincerely, Bobby Jindal Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=da4fe52f60ea4901ab067301ef14072c&_t=MN6xbc9iSx0VmDZ_Vh7q61YS0d2Y9smJsVCI22W_QvFAw17lWU0mZA9J1TzY9AkuqPlv1ttJ8sOr_tkFRwA0BDWpYODyQyZuVJPCbddWgrCzc0JRJwc_1CS3CcLPufLa1g7ITs4hq7o69An741xgJFHyHwc-gOOX_DjoNl7vbhI%3D)

subject: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b92/1127222182/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

There is so much at stake this November, Peter. I said it on the campaign trail, and I'll say it again now: In order to make change in this country, we can't just focus on the White House -- **we need to flip the Senate in order to win the era.**

It only takes four seats to win back the Senate and break Mitch McConnell's stranglehold on progress. Texas is the biggest battleground state in this election, and MJ Hegar can win it.

**[Will you join me in supporting MJ by making a donation of whatever you can to help her win Texas and flip the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b91/1127222182/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200504.2nd__1366__&amount=10")**

A lot of career politicians like Sen. Cornyn treat service as just another word for politics as usual, one partisan press release or Capitol Hill meeting at a time. But MJ and I have both served our country in uniform, and she knows that there's a different spirit of public service that we need much more of in Washington. It means putting country over politics and always upholding the oath we took to support and defend our Constitution -- no matter what.

Politicians like Mitch McConnell and his right-hand man Sen. Cornyn have made it absolutely clear they're not willing to put the well-being of our country and our people over their political agendas.

I believe there's a better way forward, and that's why I believe in MJ. **[I'm asking you to join me today in supporting her. Will you pitch in right now to elect MJ and help flip the Senate this November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b91/1127222182/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200504.2nd__1366__&amount=10")**

One more critical thing: Control of the Senate won't be the only outcome of this election here in Texas. **If we don 't flip the Senate, we will lose the Supreme Court for decades to come with more justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch.**

We cannot let that happen. That's why MJ and I are counting on you. | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b94/1127222182/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200504.2nd__1366__")**
Thanks for helping, and I'm wishing you and your loved ones well.

Pete Buttigieg

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b91/1127222182/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigieg?refcode=email_20200504.2nd__1366__&amount=10")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b8b/1127222182/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1366&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900d3/7f51f7bc/4ffbf2bf/4ef16b8a/1127222182/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

| Hi Peter \- Early voting begins tomorrow. Tomorrow is also the last day you can register to vote. If you do not register you will not be able to participate in the 2020 Primary Election on June 2.
To check if you are registered to vote please click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X2rZuqXGNs06QUH6YO8hUAJyw4Y2SKAIo1LlWcmvrWrze4oAaTfU2rnBDEHrTotBsKQoaQYdqrH0L_K1_wTPMY2lEl7YMmpwyGbBSDNiUf3sfz8gTvekBL2GM4HLGkQxV923UJ8-gLYp0XXM5gcc5ensk-eizq43BnQRLLq_DglS8LSMrhNyslmLg0-9befr&c=nemk0oRTRqQi5Gus4b9hRzOECY5bDobFR_udmdTYgRzh-QlRzNolfA==&ch=Pyrw-EnXbGeQ4ylaZQfcQWec0gwjrps7rLimWmOynpDGmjiUQ7sM7g==).
If you are not registered to vote, please click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X2rZuqXGNs06QUH6YO8hUAJyw4Y2SKAIo1LlWcmvrWrze4oAaTfU2rnBDEHrTotBRAPWTnxdLYBdLoJardf9zr7VViBtPCSDoVQlmiN1MLpXxBSvFNuyGn9KOyA2c98TTmS2B6SxXN0F8TLcd_cEHRp9oziuecwxBN0jyFXHeoesFPhXq-W6bZ0lJiQ36x0F142tLckgrJ8=&c=nemk0oRTRqQi5Gus4b9hRzOECY5bDobFR_udmdTYgRzh-QlRzNolfA==&ch=Pyrw-EnXbGeQ4ylaZQfcQWec0gwjrps7rLimWmOynpDGmjiUQ7sM7g==) to register. It takes less than 5 minutes!
---

subject: re: House of Reps NOT working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
It's time for Pelosi and Brindisi to go back to work and put the American people first [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=628d7158413340a9a8838e09d3ae11cb&_e=QcwMNhoMzZmmrJmfWHyNO0Q0zoOQzT8PLJfVN-T5i8q_4wO_P9JEfxO5UwCaPAQU5g7Q125gbbikvFbLrx5eovBMsQ9mhtl5FewjPJEyVld4TPHGsfo75bTEdAV7qau6OCE7GjAbBiA_TBP8kCwe2crfDagktgEh1bcmuF0D54FP7yEmMjK6APndrlWy359dDigvWeNXOf3fDOp3Hj2lt7gSd3-6NOl8Qlg48kSwP_PV3bLuufzx3k1EDBm1PT6L1xYFcA0IY2FNMe8qL1Q9xQX3qZ1tq9TmWWxNs_EALpWcme5JTTR4OCo2YfzVTte23maySknxdlohU-r4MF6lvXT8jBgW1Ey9xI5Ic6hAD_6HthpiGwOxwKODWNjAs5FfsABuxrFVkha6SOUfqDCDImPDVcJ4gy3uwvun82w3MBA%3D) | |
---
Peter, while Americans are struggling, radicals in Congress are making their priorities clear.

_**Nancy Pelosi refuses to call the House of Representatives back to work. **_

_That’s right - Congress is taking the week off. _

Even now, when our people, hospitals, and small businesses are suffering, Democrats are playing politics with our lives and livelihoods. They’re using this crisis as an excuse to take a vacation instead of GETTING TO WORK!

**I want you to join me today to tell Pelosi and her allies like Anthony Brindisi that Congress NEEDS to get to work to help the American people.**
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition >>>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=628d7158413340a9a8838e09d3ae11cb&_e=QcwMNhoMzZmmrJmfWHyNO0Q0zoOQzT8PLJfVN-T5i8q_4wO_P9JEfxO5UwCaPAQU5g7Q125gbbikvFbLrx5eovBMsQ9mhtl5FewjPJEyVld4TPHGsfo75bTEdAV7qau6OCE7GjAbBiA_TBP8kCwe2crfDagktgEh1bcmuF0D54FP7yEmMjK6APndrlWy359dDigvWeNXOf3fDOp3Hj2ltwlzIZWuVybK6Dmnvm7YZgSRI6XY_LMMdm2ojDGnJyqJ2QSpVp9l-dEYNPcEaeJMpOQpj6YfF0FcxEQ52gKl0jF21bk3i_7kRjo_7jpeNz8_XJblaCO-o1Qxs4G2dCrs52hU6HIscZvBmCSwU3T5g4CTLs3LhXQpGedfx5fPnQK9vrXrjPOlNWO75n4I8HwNHB9tWQBSCorScUiK-0Cbmg8%3D)
Peter, this is a difficult time for everyone.

_**But our communities are strong. We’ve been rising to the occasion. We’ve been answering the call of service and helping our neighbors, our businesses, and first responders.**_

That is what we should expect from our so-called leaders in Congress as well.

_We must stand up now and tell Nancy Pelosi to call Congress back to work to serve the people now, when we need it most._

**Join me today by adding your name:[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/work-83949/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=628d7158413340a9a8838e09d3ae11cb&_e=QcwMNhoMzZmmrJmfWHyNO0Q0zoOQzT8PLJfVN-T5i8q_4wO_P9JEfxO5UwCaPAQU5g7Q125gbbikvFbLrx5eovBMsQ9mhtl5FewjPJEyVld4TPHGsfo75bTEdAV7qau6OCE7GjAbBiA_TBP8kCwe2crfDagktgEh1bcmuF0D54FP7yEmMjK6APndrlWy359dDigvWeNXOf3fDOp3Hj2lt2-sbSIJimDxogLkoVoAtlw6owW_AA9AfGmthEliJzD7Uny_gIrut_NXtVgU6KgDDIlr7n0wxFpk99AyMWVtkyQ9ns4CfL0VfMDECNjoGLpE9i5wXslcBY3VzTHrwdsYGKNDXs6tKcdETZbQHES1RfEJCklaIvaHXrsnZV2Ybk0NziOyGvOnBE6GVSBvC6k8t8yvobd6NKnZNk6KanDg4js%3D)**

With our hospitals and health providers fearing the worst and our small businesses struggling to keep the books open under the pressure of the shutdowns, it’s simply unacceptable for our members of Congress to NOT SHOW UP.

[ **ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition >>>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=628d7158413340a9a8838e09d3ae11cb&_e=QcwMNhoMzZmmrJmfWHyNO0Q0zoOQzT8PLJfVN-T5i8q_4wO_P9JEfxO5UwCaPAQU5g7Q125gbbikvFbLrx5eovBMsQ9mhtl5FewjPJEyVld4TPHGsfo75bTEdAV7qau6OCE7GjAbBiA_TBP8kCwe2crfDagktgEh1bcmuF0D54FP7yEmMjK6APndrlWy359dDigvWeNXOf3fDOp3Hj2lt7MCcLhpMxHhOB_C4V2nvKfQnrXY06LzZ9uxYRedtnzZExU5qZwPefTylELH2LF0u64gQInxXMibCoSKmQLBR-Wdh5Fw5lSeXSPnJ_NzPHyhBnpYb2vYC3HhTvlloIkpYOYKjZWqiVNCkeHSROlZvfvAvOJBY5j0AOVDrGjBmojulHjhX-knCOWtjtaZ0xxiFPHs3GLvzeYqqYvJhcnNJGA%3D)
It's time to get to work.

Thanks,
Claudia Tenney

body:
| | | | We're sending you this short email to ensure you know that in-person absentee voting is now open across the district and that mail-in ballots will start going out to those who have requested next week.
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg._CsrymWaZmLBiKdlfce1vOI_arig==) in your browser.
---
Dear Lowcountry Neighbors, I hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy. I also hope it finds you excited that not only is our state starting to reopen but also that **_the Republican Primary is only 5 weeks away_!** We're sending you this short email to ensure you know that in-person absentee voting is now open across the district and that mail-in ballots will start going out to those who have requested next week. For details on absentee voting, _[please click here](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1AWnnx1cmgNc12r02Nab4JtzcKNMIoc8UYdG-2Fbc3dh2zJnLdtt375-2B-2BjnyCdwtM-2FH5ktdZyXn4S4QvDXCCPRxQ-3D-3D_09M_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2Brrley4L5h37OHrLKB1q1AlMO8Vfr33vLs5R3UApbGvqm4Zpt2W-2Fg9vgvRGNtGKUzZ8kCRA74GNXQOMbvoFEEprTsnfIm11bqU9ZCYVeZjgSx-2FxeM4mLCKyxIbxm9JmurWTa4KEp-2Bc67vNBX7JdT1kBUQ8QuoloAwVols8HR2oK-2FAXnzj4HbatTIatmjm9SF59zIyyDl-2FXhD8zfbO1hWmTUXe1706VTMVgQi82ILHW8ohFLLEnW-2F3gm4TlWswlSRfV2dAS9jHKO7uukcANOYOJV1eZr8k3R5v893aM1Oj5oqqxgZjBzmt6qkZU-2Bc48rxs8wM1YGFHO2EIY2oVKVw1NfVxNK00b7p0vXIdXVvnk9C6SdqPEm4gK7j-2FK2RIh3q-2FfQFATDjoI89CInuBG7F6FKoEQ-3D-3D)_ or on the image below.

Just like previous elections, those who qualify to vote absentee can do so in-person at his or her county election office weekdays, according to the following times: **Beaufort County** 15 John Galt Road, Beaufort, SC 29906 _Starting Monday, May 4th: Weekdays from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM_ 61-B Ulmer Road, Bluffton, SC 29910 _Starting Monday, May 11th: Weekdays from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM_ **Berkeley County** 6 Belt Drive, Moncks Corner, SC 29461 _Starting Monday, May 4th: Weekdays from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM_ **Charleston County** 4367 Headquarters Road, Charleston, SC 29405 _Starting Monday, May 4th: Weekdays from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM _ **Colleton County** 2471 Jefferies Highway, Walterboro, SC 29488 _Starting Monday, May 4th: Weekdays from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM_ **Dorchester County** 201 Johnston Street, St. George, SC 29477 _Starting Monday, May 4th: Weekdays from 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM_ If you prefer to vote from the safety of your home, you can **do so by mail**. It is a two-step process: submitting your absentee ballot application, then completing and returning your absentee ballot as soon as you receive it from your county election office. Again, [_we have created a page on our website dedicated to providing you the information needed to vote absentee_](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1AWnnx1cmgNc12r02Nab4JtzcKNMIoc8UYdG-2Fbc3dh2zJnLdtt375-2B-2BjnyCdwtM-2FH5ktdZyXn4S4QvDXCCPRxQ-3D-3DGSXh_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2Brrley4L5h37OHrLKB1q1AlMO8Vfr33vLs5R3UApbGvqm4Zpt2W-2Fg9vgvRGNtGKUzZ8kCRA74GNXQOMbvoFEEprTsnfIm11bqU9ZCYVeZjgSx-2FxeM4mLCKyxIbxm9JmurWTa4KEp-2Bc67vNBX7JdT1kBUQ0f-2FtRFuJLwnC6Te4WleGT1t9x1GCcVCuGiS5oxow9XODnCz4NrcnESSQZLOS3cx2nHf5bgV109pDo-2FidqGlEJcLGlD0m4Z9bECCt1dSZSxhPoesoZnaJX15p3dS-2F94FEi8VvNKWr9WT6OkKJN01hWByMr87zZmsKcrQ7W3Sa6bysDulgyy4fuRrwSKAJ3X-2Bf3xOOC-2Bw44imbhYOk7SuhD4OjdVhi-2BjjIJ0Mh2eXjoEvRQ0dw24LV-2Bn5Mje80qi6zQ-3D-3D). name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Just a few more days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# Final Days Before Ballots Arrive
Dear Friends, I am so proud to be a Montanan. Through this COVID-19 crisis, I have seen people and communities come together to help our neighbors. This past weekend Heather and I volunteered with an amazing group of people to provide thousands of pounds of food, sanitizer, and hope to community members in need. I was so proud to have a small part in this effort and am incredibly grateful to the folks who organized this. It is important that we take this time to do what we can to help. In times like these actions speak louder than words. For those who can, I encourage you to volunteer, donate, and be creative. Just because we are social distancing does not mean we can’t volunteer at a food bank, donate food items, or even pick up the phone and call a friend or neighbor who may be lonely, frightened, or depressed. Buddy Checks work! Let’s continue to lift each other up and help out our communities. I also want to thank you for your continued support throughout my campaign. The COVID19 pandemic and tasks at hand have prevented us from functioning like a traditional campaign during this time, but, we are gaining momentum. If you are able please consider a donation today to help us get this across the finish line. Thank you and may God bless you,

Troy
---
|
---
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=bcf159330f&e=a212bb87cc "DONATE NOW")
---
|
---
| _PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA

PO Box 6668 Bozeman, MT 59771

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Is your registration up to date?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Today — MAY 4 — is your last chance to update your voter registration. Don’t miss it! Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469213?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ac0b973d30&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

There have been a few changes to our Indiana primary as we continue to fight COVID-19, and we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this important information.

Our new primary date is June 2nd, but the deadline to register to vote, or make sure your registration is up to date, is TODAY, May 4th.

You can check your status at Indianavoters.in.gov, and register or update your information.
---
| [Register to Vote](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1aca25e2f3&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Register to Vote")
---
| Once you’ve registered, you can request an absentee ballot, **or vote early starting May 26.** You can review your ballot and find your polling place at [indianavoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a5ab05bfd2&e=1acd9bb3d6). And of course, you can always vote on June 2nd!

It’s important we get this info to all Hoosiers so they can make their voices heard this election season. Will you take a quick minute to forward this to five friends or family members so they can check their registration?

Don’t miss out on the **opportunity to vote**. Electing strong conservative candidates is more important than ever as we look to leaders to guide Indiana through the public health crisis and to get Hoosiers back to daily life and work.

See you at the ballot box,

Indiana Republican Party
---
| [Register to Vote](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=13d116cf5e&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Register to Vote")

name: Finance Update (via Team Christy)
subject: Did you see we have a new fundraising goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

On Friday, we started our new goal to reach $1 million online raised by the end of our special election.

Since we launched that goal, a lot has changed:
* We were endorsed by Hillary Clinton and Amy Klobuchar.
* We got one of our final ads before our election on the air.
* We had our race rated "Toss-Up" by Daily Kos Elections.

**A lot of things are changing, but this is still the same: We HAVE to win this special election on May 12th.**

**[That's why we're trying to raise $1 million to do all that we can to elect Christy on May 12th. Can you chip in right now so we can leave it all on the field?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750c/1440896694/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750d/1440896694/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750e/1440896694/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750f/1440896694/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f7508/1440896694/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f7509/1440896694/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750c/1440896694/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full")
$1 million will allow us to keep our ads on the air every day until next Tuesday. It will allow us to reach out to more voters by phone, text, and email.

**By meeting this huge fundraising goal, we can leave it all on the field.**

We all know how high the stakes are. This primarily vote-by-mail election is a bellwether of the country's views on Trump's response to the pandemic and the type of leader they want to see helping our communities get through this crisis.

**[We HAVE to elect Christy -- she's the leader we need and deserve during these challenging times. Chip in $5 or whatever you can today to make sure she is our newest representative working towards solutions in Congress.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750c/1440896694/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full")**

Thanks for stepping up. We have 8 days left -- let's do this.

\-- Finance Team

Christy for Congress

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb19/29776869/a7c9c34/569f750c/1440896694/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MDRfbWlsbGlvbmdvYWw3LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200504_milliongoal7-full")

name: Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
subject: May is Due...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, there's still time to turn it around... * |
Dear Peter, I just wanted to put the urgent email below back at the top of your inbox, just in case you missed it. As you may know, our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states **since August** , _including our newest ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate_. **Peter, if we're going to win this election, then it's absolutely crucial we stay**ON THE AIR** all the way up through Election Day...** **...and the May payment is NOW DUE...** [So please respond today with your most generous contribution.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EBJlIdb&) [I know I can count on you, Peter.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EhNqBel&) _For America,_ \- John P.S. _My original message to you with more details is below..._
---|---

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, We need your help to turn this ship around! You see, new polls show President Donald Trump and Black Conservative SUPERSTAR John James are currently **LOSING** \- _though very narrowly_ \- in the vitally important swing state of **Michigan**. Look at John James' numbers against incumbent Democrat Senator Gary Peters: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9oqJ8e&) And look at this Quinnipiac poll showing a very close presidential race in Michigan: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFQdMuS&) Of course, there's still 6 months until Election Day... ...but we MUST work hard to **Make Michigan RED** for President Trump! ...and we MUST work hard to elect Black Conservative Superstar John James to the U.S. Senate in Michigan! So what's our plan to **Make Michigan RED** this election? **Run radio ads targeting African-American voters.** In fact, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC is currently running highly-effective radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan and critical swing states and Congressional races across the country! Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television, billboards, books, and issue guides targeting African-America voters and exposing the race-baiting lies liberals have been spoon-feeding them... **...and the results have been incredible.** Study after study has shown that our ads over the past few years have significantly improved Republican votes from African-Americans. If we can take back just 17% of the black vote from Democrats, then it's impossible for them to win... ...and if we can convince 25% of Black voters to vote **RED** in 2020, we could create a massive RED TSUNAMI – up and down the ballot! | [Chip-In $20.20 to Make Michigan RED ›››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EBqpwHO&)
---
**That's not as difficult as it sounds considering 33% of black voters already call themselves conservatives and support conservative policies --- but they still vote for Democrats.**
**Making Michigan RED** this election means touting President Trump's accomplishments for the Black community:
* Record low unemployment rate for African-Americans
* Federal funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities
* Scholarships for African-American families seeking better quality schools
* Ending the killing of unborn Black babies by appointing conservative judges

[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EEUVQqT&)**Making Michigan RED** this election means electing John James as Michigan's first African American (from either party) to the United States Senate...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means persuading enough African-American voters to stop voting for the failed socialist policies that have turned Detroit and Flint into poverty-stricken war zones...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means mobilizing the conservative grassroots army that got Donald Trump elected four years ago...
That's why we need to keep our hard-hitting radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan up-and-running through Election Day.
[Peter, can you please help us continue running effective radio ads in Michigan by giving a contribution of $20.20, $35, $75, $150 or more today?](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EC109M6&)
Without the continued support of patriotic conservatives like you, there's no way we can keep our proven radio ads running...
...and the consequences of our failure in Michigan could result in the Democrats seizing control of the U.S. Senate and the White House --- _giving them the power to force their entire socialist agenda on every single American_.
[So please make your most generous contribution to keep our radio ads up-and-running through Election Day...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EtD9hn7&)
...and please **FORWARD** this email to your patriotic friends and family-members.
Tell them how vitally important the swing state of Michigan is and how our effective radio ads will Make Michigan RED for President Trump and John James!
**Remember, if the Democrats lose just 17% of the African American vote, they cannot win!**
[How much we can do is in your hands, so please respond today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EzZQJrw&)
Thank you, Peter! It's my honor to work beside you on behalf of America.
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Sz4cUM&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EwwOGd9&)
---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.
| | Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=3aig4&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EtmjSqh&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=3aig4&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EtzRSBp&pt=change_details) at any time.
[ ](https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=ytWvg&u=z93TV&z=EGDFVMa&)

subject: Trump BLOCKS COVID-19 task force from testifying

body:
| [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4a87/4bd7760e/5b24c2cd/77af04a1/2943206743/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200504_1MO_1MC_STD_2_COVIDBlocked&source=314_EM_FR_200504_1MO_1MC_STD_2_COVIDBlocked&refcode=314_EM_FR_200504_1MO_1MC_STD_2_COVIDBlocked")

**Moments ago,** Trump's White House took it a step further and BLOCKED any member of the coronavirus task force from testifying in a blatant attempt to hide the damage he's done.

The GOP Senate refuses to hold Trump accountable for failing to listen to science, but now they're refusing to force Trump's team to testify.

| | There's a lot of talk around flipping 4 seats to take back the Senate majority. But that math only adds up if we HOLD ALL of our current seats... **Peter, we have absolutely no chance of taking back the Senate if we lose Doug Jones in Alabama!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ba/72412298/4f60b943/610497e9/3980325312/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfam9uZXNzZW5hdGVfbWF5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8yMDA1MDRfSm9uZXNBTF9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IiJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_jonessenate_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200504_JonesAL_U1_X1&amount=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200504_JonesAL_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200504_JonesAL_U1_X1") _But POLITICO just reported that Democrats haven 't pledged resources to help Jones hold this vital seat! Even worse, Republicans think they can win this seat, so they'll be giving it all they've got._ **Jones has no shot of holding this seat without us on his side. name: James Mackler
subject: Facts are facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Even if Trump doesn't like them.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa170/18d6a294/4cbb9a82/26d60dab/1498040392/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | **_" Our liberty depends on the freedom of the press, and that cannot be limited without being lost."_
\- Thomas Jefferson** Yesterday was World Press Freedom Day, and while our country enjoys a free press, nearly every day, President Trump, his Administration, and his loyalists like Bill Hagerty go out of their way to undermine the press. Trump's endless attacks on the press endanger our government, our democracy, and our national security. [_**Will you add your name to mine to stand with journalists and defend the freedom of the press?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa170/18d6a294/4cbb9a82/26d60da8/1498040392/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200504p_a") | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa170/18d6a294/4cbb9a82/26d60da8/1498040392/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200504p_a")
---
The Founders knew the importance of a free press -- that's why they enshrined it in our Bill of Rights. The press exists to speak truth to power, provide the public with critical information, and holds leaders accountable.
But Trump has relentlessly demonized the media and journalists during rallies, calling stories he doesn't like "**fake news** ", or hoaxes, and calling the press the "**enemy of the people**."
Rubber stamps like Marsha Blackburn and now Bill Hagerty have stood by these attacks on our free press and even echoed them.
_**But just because you don 't like the facts doesn't mean they aren't true.**_
When I was flying Black Hawk helicopters in Iraq, I couldn't choose to ignore how much fuel was left in the tank or what our altitude was.
The president's assault on a free press has eroded public trust in fact-based reporting, and that's particularly dangerous during a health crisis. A recent report found 62% of Americans believed the media was exaggerating the risks posed by COVID-19.
Freedom of the press is an essential liberty that I've fought to defend on the battlefield and in the courtroom, and we must protect it.
[_**Add your name today and join our fight to defend the freedom of the press ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa170/18d6a294/4cbb9a82/26d60da8/1498040392/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200504p_a")
| | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa170/18d6a294/4cbb9a82/26d60da8/1498040392/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200504p_a")
---
In service,
James

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa170/18d6a294/4cbb9a82/26d60da9/1498040392/VEsA/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Miss President Trump’s Town Hall? See the 10 best moments.
body:
With the Lincoln Memorial as a backdrop, President Trump took questions from Americans for 2 hours last night as part of a Fox News Virtual Town Hall. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=842abeb753&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 4, 2020
---
| | |
# **Top 10 moments from President Trump’s Town Hall **

**With the Lincoln Memorial** as a backdrop, President Trump took questions from Americans for 2 hours last night as part of a Fox News Virtual Town Hall.

**“We never had** a more beautiful set than this,” the President said.

**Together, Americans** are beating this Coronavirus. After months of slowing the spread of disease, our country is prepared for the next stage in this fight. Last night, President Trump explained why safely reopening is the right thing to do for our people:

1. 🎬 [**America leads the world in testing.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb3ad8e69e&e=3ee4985eea) When the virus struck, President Trump quickly revolutionized our nation’s testing system, clearing regulatory hurdles to get the private sector involved. The United States has now conducted more than 6.5 million tests—far greater than any other country on Earth.

2. 🎬 [**We’re safely getting back to work.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=274b1ae5bf&e=3ee4985eea) “We did the right thing,” President Trump says when asked about his aggressive actions to slow the spread of COVID-19. “We saved millions of lives, but now we have to get [our economy] back open, and we have to get it back open safely but as quickly as possible.”

3. 🎬 [**The best economy in history will be back!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=79e21d5656&e=3ee4985eea) Before Coronavirus, America saw rising wages and its lowest unemployment rate in half a century. “We built the greatest economy in the world,” President Trump said. Once this invisible enemy passes, the American people—with this President’s help—will do it again.

4. **🎬** [**Relief is already here.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92277b7169&e=3ee4985eea) The Trump Administration wasted no time steering $3 trillion into our economy, protecting American workers and businesses with direct deposit checks, forgivable small business loans, and more. “We’re talking 30 million jobs that we’ve saved. Thirty million jobs,” President Trump said.

5. 🎬 [**Early, strong action worked.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26ccfff757&e=3ee4985eea) In January, President Trump restricted travel from China and announced a White House Coronavirus Task Force. Democrat leaders called the response “xenophobic.” Facts proved them wrong.

6. 🎬 [**China’s propaganda won’t work.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30b1e511e8&e=3ee4985eea) This virus started in China, and it should’ve been stopped long before it spread rapidly across the globe. The Chinese Communist government has tried to blame everyone from the U.S. military to our European allies for the pandemic—everyone but themselves.

7. 🎬 [**We need products made in America.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81ae328e9a&e=3ee4985eea) Past presidents did nothing while American jobs went to China. Coronavirus has exposed the danger of relying on foreign supply chains. “We’re bringing that whole supply chain back. Nobody has to tell me to do it. I’ve been talking about that for years,” President Trump says.

8. 🎬 [**Schools should reopen—soon.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3dcfb5eeb&e=3ee4985eea) This fall, American schools and colleges should reopen as planned, the President said. “We have to get our schools back.”

9. **🎬** [**America is the “king of ventilators.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=637074d042&e=3ee4985eea) Around-the-clock coordination between the federal government and states has produced incredible results.

10. 🎬 [**“We have to get our people back to church.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8b61d917e&e=3ee4985eea) Faith and prayer have helped many Americans during this tough time. “It’s wonderful to watch people over a laptop, but it’s not like being at a church,” President Trump says. “And we have to get our people back to churches, and we’re going to start doing it soon.”

[Read the full transcript from President Trump’s Fox News Town Hall here.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6c04fff4b&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: With the Lincoln Memorial as a backdrop, President Trump took questions from Americans for 2 hours last night as part of a Fox News Virtual Town Hall. | | | | | The White House • May 4, 2020 | | | Top 10 moments from President Trump’s Town Hall With the Lincoln Memorial as a backdrop, President Trump took questions from Americans for 2 hours last night as part of a Fox News Virtual Town Hall. “We never had a more beautiful set than this,” the President said. Together, Americans are beating this Coronavirus. After months of slowing the spread of disease, our country is prepared for the next stage in this fight. Last night, President Trump explained why safely reopening is the right thing to do for our people: 1. 🎬 When the virus struck, President Trump quickly revolutionized our nation’s testing system, clearing regulatory hurdles to get the private sector involved. The United States has now conducted more than 6.5 million tests—far greater than any other country on Earth. 2. 🎬 “We did the right thing,” President Trump says when asked about his aggressive actions to slow the spread of COVID-19. “We saved millions of lives, but now we have to get [our economy] back open, and we have to get it back open safely but as quickly as possible.” 3. 🎬 Before Coronavirus, America saw rising wages and its lowest unemployment rate in half a century. “We built the greatest economy in the world,” President Trump said. Once this invisible enemy passes, the American people—with this President’s help—will do it again. 4. 🎬 The Trump Administration wasted no time steering $3 trillion into our economy, protecting American workers and businesses with direct deposit checks, forgivable small business loans, and more. “We’re talking 30 million jobs that we’ve saved. Thirty million jobs,” President Trump said. 5. 🎬 In January, President Trump restricted travel from China and announced a White House Coronavirus Task Force. Democrat leaders called the response “xenophobic.” Facts proved them wrong. 6. 🎬 This virus started in China, and it should’ve been stopped long before it spread rapidly across the globe. The Chinese Communist government has tried to blame everyone from the U.S. military to our European allies for the pandemic—everyone but themselves. 7. 🎬 Past presidents did nothing while American jobs went to China. Coronavirus has exposed the danger of relying on foreign supply chains. “We’re bringing that whole supply chain back. Nobody has to tell me to do it. I’ve been talking about that for years,” President Trump says. 8. 🎬 This fall, American schools and colleges should reopen as planned, the President said. “We have to get our schools back.” 9. 🎬 Around-the-clock coordination between the federal government and states has produced incredible results. 10. 🎬 Faith and prayer have helped many Americans during this tough time. “It’s wonderful to watch people over a laptop, but it’s not like being at a church,” President Trump says. “And we have to get our people back to churches, and we’re going to start doing it soon.” | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump participates in a FOX News Channel virtual town hall live from the Lincoln Memorial | May 3, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:
It’s all about getting Indiana back on track while protecting the health and safety of vulnerable Hoosiers. | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

Last week, Governor Holcomb _**unveiled his Back on Track plan**_ – a phased, systematic, data-driven plan for reopening Indiana over the next two months.

It’s all about getting Indiana back on track while protecting the health and safety of vulnerable Hoosiers.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c228b6273df04e1b91ea2f1ec708707e&_e=UpbUUxm2jI85bOLrk-igy3BVsCPGjvtHJhDllGvigiBE7b6GKe0hkiVRcoAKgz47u5f3gmzMLjdhU_Gn-qTkX5N-nf3equPaMBVGCgArrt4F3nhzTst5WMvGxhyaCroLGJNrc1UR-bi8W-ZfW3Okp7mKJwtowKxILyyZiu58JJ3p_3Tlq6BlcROVbNjOcvO0MY6qxgpxdTX8gjxeYWrYDe5RoVw5aOX1cIysjDZ1uKcGEp7YnWQElODa2pLJHgdElp1L959v27C45grYfdZXsKD6e_fPrlMstqsTEemEOWXNuFVhx_6aV8KK983xvRZB0GyFj4bMMT7mWzdok6KNceP0hHMW-8cgtd0IFV64FjS_TYlggumN5tZI6DVADoS42NqW8LeYYTaUBkets2spuRhjHWEm0cFaCMmyOGHSWGaS3kZAPGKo35QxcAUonihm)
[ **SHARE: Details on Gov. Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c228b6273df04e1b91ea2f1ec708707e&_e=UpbUUxm2jI85bOLrk-igy3BVsCPGjvtHJhDllGvigiBE7b6GKe0hkiVRcoAKgz47u5f3gmzMLjdhU_Gn-qTkX5N-nf3equPaMBVGCgArrt4F3nhzTst5WMvGxhyaCroLGJNrc1UR-bi8W-ZfW3Okp7mKJwtowKxILyyZiu58JJ3p_3Tlq6BlcROVbNjOcvO0MY6qxgpxdTX8gjxeYWrYDe5RoVw5aOX1cIysjDZ1uKdtOmGWLDP_vBJa52QRE3M8J6UH1TLNWn4IC205vchHnR-p9jjyQkjHUgeBPe0NU85m8fx56k6QGr01Jfuam6p5N3YJcbIGzeVHec7mcSoH79nctSdf9_5szfkcu9OYqQddFte_3Ic2cdDXvgTk8kunlP1PG3p076ibM_glQCmJltWOTo3-8cFIBTIAib3d62eneBKDIzv6ebJmjSagQMhj)
One of the guiding principles of this phased reopening is the ability to test all Hoosiers who are showing COVID-19 symptoms. _**And this Wednesday, the state’s large-scale, statewide, drive-through testing program will open – making it even easier for any symptomatic Hoosier to get tested.**_

To schedule an appointment, visit **[lhi.care/covidtesting](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c228b6273df04e1b91ea2f1ec708707e&_e=UpbUUxm2jI85bOLrk-igyyljZ_H64YTIXq4oi4DDyNmFmmTl8unPeCd32cOz5abNYZ1XuNiUYwswyM1UflfhFoeVg7-_4ihvwb7TJ9oL7ibisFpUjHdc6ZKEMcU6czwLka3YPll2eqn2A5JGUE1Ei6yoVLmiVCbi56F-io5CujEEpkNqiyUo0S7vzClw4GnCb-ttLz8Fr8p_PyoBngsAORl11HanpzghfGPInBbMNPrSMRquXKKWpd0035dDYMm9DEDbjTKvPRgrBMasfWVUG0SzfuHOZruG_paDpKlu5CSEQ20QPrZs3FXqkldU6WfNyNuAC4fMK3kN1wE8XwlzcTdDdQrrmUU11s8bswcM30q_FuRbXLiPbsLexiQh6M7H)** or call 888-634-1123. This _**state testing is free**_ , and you don’t need insurance.

This will place _**Indiana with more than 100 testing spots across the state**_ – including drive-through clinics, hospitals, local health departments and other community-based testing.

Check out an **[interactive map here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c228b6273df04e1b91ea2f1ec708707e&_e=UpbUUxm2jI85bOLrk-igyyHAAnE7jUm1JaXJwshP08wuPHXc2vI6s7nLfuLSQr8ZFny15OAlBXQIxdERo0GH0daTReYxKfEjDY0q9QTYo8mzch1xv4esVlJ0YZqCx7AktBN8TIGsIw-9ckermKKxBQUjbGxvsLc2wbUs0islqgDBIj6bkqnHULhfQv3TB-CD5cdX39u3Onegv8WjdKpxHo7PUgeUvjabsR3bw829IaHtxSaLtrgaiKguUwvg13qKnL4GTHf8pWa3uArK6d_zh5W2jMSZcI_J_ej2K2vYKGNC_kLEqMXCwNTWG08Ny6wda29r98D7U5KqB9q_FjGDkijtPshgSY7V1zzS2a1Ly69vPSd4bQbULgIYsn4zyXWRUCOH4TMiMkAywOfTwWI1zQ%3D%3D)** , and find a site closest to you.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c228b6273df04e1b91ea2f1ec708707e&_e=UpbUUxm2jI85bOLrk-igyyHAAnE7jUm1JaXJwshP08wuPHXc2vI6s7nLfuLSQr8ZFny15OAlBXQIxdERo0GH0daTReYxKfEjDY0q9QTYo8mzch1xv4esVlJ0YZqCx7AktBN8TIGsIw-9ckermKKxBQUjbGxvsLc2wbUs0islqgDBIj6bkqnHULhfQv3TB-CDTLi3GmM467G4CbrOH-n0PkRZDQFaMrUkcMaMX6MS2Attf1AmqbfwFlKFKSmk3Nc9yn2onJvg4IKCmGpvEMgEot8_uxHS7IFdxcFgFAGjS23ahBpetV4VinvcRxxAKlOsWo6FWhw7A0FRhGtQ_dYc3itNzEJsCXZIpg4WS-_N8zScSp1d5e4MwiCBE6bWvXtXgUZm1MNYLdSfwcTKDowRHA%3D%3D)
[**Find Your Closest Testing Site**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c228b6273df04e1b91ea2f1ec708707e&_e=UpbUUxm2jI85bOLrk-igyyHAAnE7jUm1JaXJwshP08wuPHXc2vI6s7nLfuLSQr8ZFny15OAlBXQIxdERo0GH0daTReYxKfEjDY0q9QTYo8mzch1xv4esVlJ0YZqCx7AktBN8TIGsIw-9ckermKKxBQUjbGxvsLc2wbUs0islqgDBIj6bkqnHULhfQv3TB-CDW5ppoDiqgI5wJBwlPwck8_D1nASghv1M_bgK_QgrXAtbgyOSCP2uuZq5tQn_I5hjiLAyvgEtLaRooZSGINvOqPCqrwUE8AY0Suxd3FN7aYFz4KIWse1YWqOn_rQgsMH1Oi8gdFyrzJNj8hJYdBe9Be5HeeqKORqySBSzT3Iat8EoZ8FPeuxO3-5uEypxZH9bphQq3tUWN5tcP2ZLYdN0IQ%3D%3D)
_**As most Hoosiers enter Phase Two of Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track plan, it’s more important than ever that Hoosiers who are showing symptoms get tested.**_

Together, we’re making progress, and together, we’ll continue to save lives and fight the spread of COVID-19.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

subject: Iowa's Nice Guy and Iowa's Admiral

body:

|

| |
---

| | Hi everyone: Since happy hour in person is out of the question, we have something almost as good on Friday night -- **Virtual ****Happy Hour with Iowa 's Nice Guy, Scott Siepker.** The Admiral and Scott will have a beer, carefully chosen from the incredible stock of Iowa's brews, and discuss campaigning, affairs of state, people, and maybe the finer points of each other's drink selections. Dial in for an hour of storytelling. Scott can talk about how he sees things in the state as a media professional; Admiral Mike expands that into a world-wide perspective. As ever, humor will rule the day. [_**Join us on Facebook Live.**_ ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24b1/33365068/4a72796c/3f8bf876/107385836/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/events/187637918937018/")Grab your favorite Iowa brew and join in the conversation on Iowa, politics, and more. ---
Friend,

**The Chinese Communist Party is a serious threat to American prosperity and national security. **

_That’s why we can’t risk a Joe Biden presidency in 2020. _

Joe Biden has spent the last four decades in Washington vigorously defending China – **at the expense of American entrepreneurs, jobs, and taxpayers’ dollars.**
[ **Add your name to say "NO" to Beijing Biden** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e3b58796369d42e789d83017595dbf15&_e=M60vhN3IQBQHuJgOcDQoi43J1azOdgiQ0PCIih2NRxPb8BmBPOLmNTDZNx3CWcSyozStrSDGz_qDTGosi8BoXWtbMld5_j8QP6YNhCezcWrr1DYbBY-FEnXf5KwhsxuybXLBZgVoTClwQV66FWKk-lTgOLjib84wvoeZvFZtmBup_YbSS1QfzWaMfD4Br1xm3j5xcQ20j0toc6qLLKEEQPRF7_uqqYu9MNYsKHS1Mvr1GWlkX-Ns2iqBvjUAnkjmzZ5Vgeb7D514e-JIYD8f_omXkEBG4HxD7HH1RjnGk0dbqpPh8m4O2kn2dXRKLiyVLRxBdGaU_NwNuSpuN5BvO3tEsQII8dgInZmC16Wn8n3GKH7aWTHSIhh6QSsvCcdzgv90Kv1Sjg6GhgPEYpPDBP5K3iMdr3GmHoTbWdc2Xb9KYDEtEfpd4MxHB_arLbBWjpYbRpvd4fhR83Tqo691VkRQyiz6zanJBK2uvrGqaBo%3D)
**One look at Joe’s record proves that he’s earned the title of “Beijing Biden.” See for yourself:
**

✔ Biden said that “it is in our self-interest that China continue to prosper” while Vice President
✔ Biden called a ban on travel from China in the wake of COVID-19 “hysterical xenophobia”
✔ Biden said that “a rising China is a positive development” for the world
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: BEIJING BIDEN IS WRONG FOR AMERICA** ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e3b58796369d42e789d83017595dbf15&_e=M60vhN3IQBQHuJgOcDQoi43J1azOdgiQ0PCIih2NRxPb8BmBPOLmNTDZNx3CWcSyozStrSDGz_qDTGosi8BoXWtbMld5_j8QP6YNhCezcWrr1DYbBY-FEnXf5KwhsxuybXLBZgVoTClwQV66FWKk-lTgOLjib84wvoeZvFZtmBup_YbSS1QfzWaMfD4Br1xm3j5xcQ20j0toc6qLLKEEQPRF7_uqqYu9MNYsKHS1Mvr1GWlkX-Ns2iqBvjUAnkjmzZ5Vgeb7D514e-JIYD8f_g778sUX-e0w7G2Qjfb-fG-u49p3LInqKn2AuQfb7qgps4Tk1fz3pV59fpToInCYCK5qOVv6eXFecGBNO_nzsMAhojPhRGcn-KbPW6n0xFMtKB6sV3ukm8YUAkHL9ib_TFsC0lqeWPFwMp6FWSmejiGqGSFzzDqJiWEh0O5AarKSw91-F9f5UbQIjCwGTRoGuUthSq0epOIfITShZXQzqEU%3D)
Illinois can’t afford to let Beijing Biden in the White House.

As Vice President, he helped China’s economy reach new heights, and we lost millions of good-paying American jobs as a result – many of which were right here in Illinois. A Joe Biden presidency would only bring more economic hardship to Illinois families, businesses, and workers.

**It’s simple. Every step of the way, Joe Biden has done what’s best for Chinese businesses and workers — not Americans. **

We need to protect our entrepreneurs, workers, and their families, and that means making sure that Joe Biden never occupies the Oval Office.
